title: Graphic Designer with Marketing/Advertising Background
description:
Part-Time / Freelance Designer (Experienced Only)



An Australian-based digital marketing agency is looking for a Part-time / Freelance Designer to create high-performing ad creatives for social media campaigns.



This is NOT a beginner role. We are looking for someone with real experience designing ads, ideally someone who has been creating performance-driven creatives for several years.



We work with multiple brands and industries, so you must be comfortable adapting your design style depending on brand guidelines, audience, and campaign objectives.



Great ad design is not just about making something look nice. It is about capturing attention, communicating quickly, and encouraging people to take action.



If you are someone who is obsessed with details, cares about alignment, spacing, and composition, and takes pride in quality-checking your own work, this role may be a great fit.



We are also looking for someone who can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions. Your creative thinking and professional judgment are highly valued.



Skills We're Looking For



• Proficient in Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, and Canva

• Video editing skills are a strong advantage

• Portfolio MUST include social media ads or social media posts

• Please do not apply if you do not have examples of social ad creatives

• Strong communication skills (verbal and written)

• Able to explain the reasoning behind your design decisions and ideas

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to adapt to different brand guidelines and visual styles

• Willing to learn, share knowledge, and be dependable

• Proactive and shows initiative



Experience Required



• At least 2 years of professional design experience, preferably creating marketing or advertising creatives

• Experience working in a digital marketing agency or handling multiple brands is a strong advantage

• Strong marketing awareness or understanding of how potential buyers think and respond to ads

• Experience creating designs specifically for social media ads or marketing campaigns is highly preferred



What You'll Be Designing



•
 and Instagram ad creatives

• Social media promotional posts

• Marketing visuals for different brands and campaigns

•
 marketing images

• Article images



Computer Setup Requirements



• Reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Personal computer or laptop capable of running design software smoothly

• Functioning webcam and microphone for meetings and communication



Pay



• We pay pretty depending on your skills, experience, and ability to collaborate effectively with the team



How to Apply



Please submit your application using this form:

title: Remote Real Estate Development Project Manager
description:
Our Land Use Planning and Entitlements Team in our Los Angeles office has a Remote working opportunity for a highly qualified Virtual Assistant to join our team. The ideal candidate will be female, 28 years or older, fluent in English, and equipped with excellent communication and critical thinking skills. This role requires someone dependable, resourceful, and committed to delivering efficient, high-quality results.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Handle daily work assignments with accuracy and professionalism.

Demonstrate excellent comprehension skills to quickly understand and execute tasks.

Take initiative to improve workflow and streamline processes.

Apply critical thinking to evaluate and analyze to resolve job assignment challenges

Work on a variety of projects and tasks, ensuring attention to detail and on-time delivery.

Organize and hosting online meeting, taking meeting minute

Manage inbound and outbound calls, providing excellent customer interaction and support.



We want someone who doesn’t just complete assignments but takes ownership of their work. A candidate who can adapt to new challenges, remain calm under pressure, and is dedicated to ensuring tasks are done correctly, efficiently, and with quality results.



QUALIFICATIONS INCLUDE:

Female, 30 years or older (required).

Proficient in English with strong verbal and written communication skills.

Must be available to work between 9am to 3pm Pacific (California) time frame.

Highly resourceful, detail-oriented, and efficient.

Comfortable with multitasking across different projects.





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

 your resume to

title: Hiring Talent: SEO Content Writer | Remote | 13th Month | Paid Vacation | Long-Term Role
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based lifestyle platform serving a large Korean-American audience. Our mission is to provide high-quality guides, helpful resources, and smart recommendations for families living in the United States. As our company expands, we are looking for a skilled SEO Content Writer who can write clear, engaging, well-researched articles that inform, inspire, and rank well on Google.



You must understand how SEO works, how to structure articles for readability, and how to produce content that feels helpful and natural - never robotic. This is a stable, long-term role with opportunities for growth, bonuses, and a collaborative, supportive team.





What You Will Do

• Write high-quality lifestyle, shopping, and evergreen guide articles

• Apply SEO best practices (headings, formatting, keywords, search intent)

• Research topics using Google, Reddit, YouTube, and competitor sites

• Create clean, well-structured content using our template & SOPs

• Follow brand tone, formatting rules, and mobile-friendly writing style

• Collaborate with our U.S. and Korean editorial teams

• Ensure articles are clear, factual, and genuinely useful for readers



Ideal Candidate

• Strong writing and editing skills in English

• Experience with SEO writing, blogging, editorial work, or content creation

• Understands keyword intent, H1/H2 structure, and clean formatting

• Knows how to write articles that feel natural (not AI-sounding)

• Excellent researcher — can verify facts and compare sources

• Detail-oriented with strong grammar and organization

• Follows instructions and can work under deadlines

• Stable internet and a reliable computer

• Willing to learn our SOPs and improve continuously

• Bonus points if you: Have Wordpress experience



Hours, Compensation & Benefits

• Full-time — 40 hours/week

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST)

• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• 13th month pay

• Paid vacation days

• Performance-based bonuses

• Long-term, stable employment

• Supportive, positive team with clear processes



How to Apply

 your application and resume to: 
 with subject line: “[Your Full Name] – SEO Content Writer Applicant”



Required Application Questions. Please answer all of the following:

 1. What SEO writing experience do you have? Please be specific.

 2. Share links to 2–4 past writing samples you’re most proud of.

 3. Can you work full U.S. EST hours?

 4. How many hours per week can you work (minimum & maximum)?

 5. Describe your home office setup (computer specs + internet speed).

 6. Why do you believe you are a strong fit for this role?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary (PHP)?

title: Online Deal Researcher & Content Uploader | Full-Time | Remote | 13th Month + Bonuses
description:
We are a leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform serving a large Asian-American audience. Our company is rapidly expanding, and we are building a top-tier team of E-Commerce Deal Researchers who will help millions of shoppers discover the best deals every day.



We are looking for smart, detail-oriented people who love online shopping, researching products, and finding great prices. If you’ve worked with Amazon sellers, online arbitrage, product sourcing, or e-commerce research, this role will feel natural to you.



This is a long-term, stable role with growth, bonuses, and an amazing team culture.





What You Will Do

• Search major online retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Costco, etc.)

• Identify the best deals, trending items, and lowest-priced products

• Compare prices using simple tools (Keepa, Amazon price history, etc. — training provided)

• Upload deals into our custom CMS (simple workflow, not WordPress)

• Write short, clear English descriptions for each deal

• Track fast-moving deals and limited-time offers

• Follow daily content schedules and coordinate with our editorial team

• Help our audience save money by selecting only high-value deals





Ideal Candidate

• Experience with Amazon product research, online arbitrage, VA product sourcing, or e-commerce research

• Fast and accurate researcher

• Excellent English reading and writing skills

• Can spot good prices, high-demand items, and “hidden gem” deals

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable, disciplined, and able to follow SOPs

• Stable internet and working computer

• Comfortable working at a fast pace during sales seasons (Prime Day, Black Friday)





Hours, Pay & Benefits

• Full-time — 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday

• Must be available during US Eastern Standard Time (EST)

• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• 13th month pay

• Paid vacation days

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term, stable employment with opportunities to advance

• Supportive, positive, fast-growing team





How to Apply



 your application to: 
 line: “[Your Full Name] – E-Commerce Deal Researcher Applicant”



Please include:

• Your resume

• Your answers to the questions below



Application Questions (Required)

 1. Do you have experience in Amazon product research, online arbitrage, or deal finding?

 2. How many hours per week can you work (minimum & maximum)?

 3. Can you work full U.S. EST hours?

 4. Describe your computer, internet speed, and headset.

 6. Why do you think you would succeed in this role?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary (PHP)?

title: Fashion Editor (Luxury & Korean Trends) | 13th Month | Paid Vacation Days
description:
A leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform for Korean-American women is seeking a Fashion Editor with exceptional taste and a refined understanding of luxury and trend-forward fashion.



Our platform showcases curated fashion, beauty, and lifestyle selections that inspire a sophisticated, global audience.

You will be responsible for selecting, curating, and writing about products that resonate with our readers — from trending K-style pieces to iconic luxury brands.





Responsibilities

• Curate and select fashion products from luxury and trending brands

• Write short, engaging posts that highlight what’s stylish and relevant

• Research and analyze current fashion and beauty trends

• Collaborate with the content and design team to create visually appealing posts

• Help define the brand’s fashion and lifestyle editorial voice for our growing audience





Qualifications

• Strong sense of fashion, trends, and aesthetics

• Familiarity with top global and Korean-favorite brands (Chanel, Dior, Loewe, Prada, etc.)

• Experience in fashion writing, editing, styling, or merchandising preferred

• Fashion or Design degree a plus (not required if you have strong experience or taste)

• Excellent written English and ability to write concise, engaging copy

• Basic understanding of online publishing or CMS platforms

• Photoshop, Canva, or image editing skills a plus





Hours of Work, Pay, and Employee Benefits

• Competitive pay based on experience and performance

• Bi-weekly pay via bank transfer

• Performance-based bonuses

• 13th Month Pay

• 12 Paid Vacation Days per year starting Month 7

• 5 Paid Sick Days per year

• Company-paid SSS Contribution starting Month 7





How to Apply

 to 
 with the subject line: “[Your Full Name] – Fashion Editor Applicant”

title: Full time Bookkeeper
description:
I am hiring a full time bookkeeper to help support my growing business.



We started in the UK over 4 years ago and expanded to the UAE over 2 years ago. You can checkout our UAE website to see what we're about & how we work with clients. 









We have struggled to find a reliable & loyal bookkeeper who can support the needs of the business.



As this businesses is newer the role includes an element of fixed weekly tasks and ad hoc tasks. It requires someone who is willing to learn and be adaptable as we grow and take on new clients.



We are looking for someone who is detail oriented & reliable. At this stage, the role will not have any direct client contact, however that will change over time.



The majority of the clients are on Zohobooks but some are on Xero.



You will be given training in the role and given 15 clients to initially handle. Once you have proven your capabilities you will be given more clients & more responsibilities.



We are looking for someone who doesn’t have any other clients or work, loyalty and focus are key attributes for us and we want someone who is willing to grow with the business and grow in the role and slowly take on more and more.



Your main tasks will be (to be performed on a weekly basis):

- Logging into Zoho books or Xero & categorising transactions

- Reviewing client invoices in hubdoc / Zoho documents & adding the correct VAT rate

- Matching client invoices to Xero or Zohobooks

- Creating client sales invoices

- Providing a list of expenses missing invoices / receipts so we can follow up with the client.

- Updating our internal client sheet that tracks the current status of each client & when there are upcoming deadlines

- Providing a report on work done & status of clients



Additional tasks to be performed on a monthly / ad hoc basis:

- Preparation of management account package to send to the client showing current results for the year

- Corporate Tax registrations

- VAT registrations



Essential requirements for the role:

- prior bookkeeping experience

- detail oriented

- reliable

- proficient written & oral communication in English



Ideal requirements for the role:

- previous experience bookkeeping for UAE clients / companies

- familiar with UAE VAT

- familiar with expense categorisations in the UAE

- experience with hubdoc & xero & zoho books





If you apply for the role there will be some back & forth via message /
, followed by a video call.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Executive Assistant. This role provides high-level administrative support to the CEO, ensuring the smooth operation of daily activities. This role involves managing schedules, coordinating meetings, handling communications, and performing a wide range of administrative tasks to support executives in their strategic responsibilities. The Executive Assistant acts as a key point of contact and is responsible for maintaining confidentiality, ensuring efficient workflow, and managing critical tasks with professionalism and discretion.



Responsibilities:

Manage the executive’s calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements, and ensuring that time is allocated efficiently.

Act as the primary point of contact for internal and external communications, screening calls,
s, and visitors, and directing inquiries as appropriate.

Coordinate meetings, conferences, and events, including preparing agendas, arranging logistics, and ensuring all materials are available.

Prepare and edit correspondence, reports, presentations, and other documents on behalf of the executive.

Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and ensure sensitive documents are securely maintained.

Assist with special projects, conducting research, gathering data, and preparing reports as required by the executive.

Liaise with other departments and executives to ensure smooth communication and collaboration on cross-functional initiatives.

Anticipate the executive's needs and provide support to ensure they are well-prepared for meetings, presentations, and other engagements.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience (1-2 years) as an Executive Assistant, Personal Assistant, or in a similar role supporting senior executives.

Exceptional organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple responsibilities, and meet deadlines.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional and polished demeanor.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in completing tasks.

High level of discretion and confidentiality when handling sensitive information.

Proficiency in GSuite (Doc, Sheet, Slides, Drive) and Zoom Workspace and familiarity with office management tools and software.

Ability to work independently and proactively, with a strong sense of initiative.

Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with executives, staff, and external contacts.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.

title: Assistant Strata Manager
description:
Yaran Property Group (
) is a property development and investment company established in 1996. To date the company has completed over 1100 dwellings across 60+ projects in WA focusing on affordable housing, and housing for those with a disability.



The mission of Yaran is “to be a blessing to others through housing which is affordable, fit-for-purpose, and environmentally conscious”.



Yaran Strata Management, a subsidiary of Yaran Property Group, is dedicated to providing exceptional strata management services to strata companies around Perth.



The company currently operates 50 strata schemes comprising approximately 629 dwellings under its strata management business. Yaran is looking for an Assistant Strata Manager to assist managing and improve the processes of the current strata management operations while expanding the strata business by pursuing new business development opportunities.

We are rapidly expanding the strata business by acquiring new managements from existing strata schemes not affiliated with the Yaran Group.

title: Remote Virtual Estimator
description:
USE THIS FORM TO SUBMIT YOUR INFORMATION. NO MESSAGES WILL BE CONSIDERED WITHOUT FORM COMPLETION. 



Profile Summary

Role Type: Remote / Virtual



Key Focus: Accuracy in cost estimation, quantity takeoffs, and bid preparation.



Ideal Candidate: A detail-oriented individual with strong mathematical skills, deep industry knowledge (e.g., construction or electrical), and the ability to work autonomously. Clear and effective communicator. C2 & C1 professional level. 



Primary Industries: Construction (Commercial/Residential)



Job Description



Core Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Analysis: Analyze project documents, blueprints, and specifications to determine labor, material, and equipment costs.



Quantity Takeoffs: Perform detailed digital measurements and list all materials required for project completion using specialized software.



Bid Preparation: Change complex cost data into professional, competitive bid proposals and executive summaries.



Vendor & Subcontractor Coordination: Research prices, manage bids from subcontractors, and maintain relationships with suppliers.



Risk Assessment: Identify potential financial or operational risks and suggest cost-reduction or value-engineering options.



Communication: Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and clients through video conferencing,
, and virtual meetings to clarify project scopes.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Technical Proficiency: CRM Construction Online



Analytical & Math Skills: Strong ability in algebra, geometry, and financial analysis to prevent costly errors.



Experience: 

Typically requires 3–7+ years of industry experience (e.g., as a project manager, estimator) to understand field complexities.



Education/Certification: 

A bachelor's degree in Construction Management or Engineering is often preferred but not always mandatory. Experience is more attractive.



Professional certifications like Certified Professional Estimator (CPE) or Certified Estimating Professional (CEP) are highly valued.



Remote Work Competency: Self-motivated, with excellent time management skills and a secure, high-bandwidth, and home office setup.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional and polished demeanor.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in completing tasks.

Proficiency in GSuite (Doc, Sheet, Slides, Drive) and Zoom Workspace and familiarity with office management tools and software.

title: Social Media Marketing Specialist (Remote)
description:
Position Overview:



We are seeking a creative and strategic Social Media Marketing Specialist to join our admissions team remotely from the Philippines. In this role, you will provide remote support to our Canadian headquarters in strengthening our online presence and expanding our international outreach—focusing on brand storytelling and community engagement. The ideal candidate will be a hands-on social media professional capable of managing our digital presence while building meaningful partnerships in the Philippines and other strategic international markets.

                                                                     



What You'll Do:



•Develop and implement an integrated social media and content strategy to boost brand visibility, audience engagement, and admissions outreach.

•Manage day-to-day social media operations—including content creation, scheduling, publishing, and community engagement—across Instagram,
, TikTok, and other relevant platforms.

•Produce compelling multimedia content such as stories, newsletters, photos, and videos that capture authentic school life, student achievements, and campus culture.

•Proactively identify and build relationships with educational institutions and partners in the Philippines as well as other strategic international markets—to explore collaborations and expand the school’s global network.

•Monitor, analyze, and report on social media and partnership performance to refine strategy and drive continuous improvement.



What We're Looking For:



•Bachelor's degree in Communications, Marketing, Digital Media, or related field.



•3+ years of hands-on experience managing social media channels for market expansion.



•Proven experiences in building relationships with agencies or partners (Education sector is a plus).



•Excellent English storytelling, writing, and communication skills



•A good desktop computer or a laptop with reliable internet connection



•Highly organized, proactive individual capable of managing multiple projects, with a strong interest in international education and cross-cultural partnership development; 



To apply, please include the following with your application:

•Your Resume

•Link to your portfolio





About Us:



Founded in 2013, Canada Star Education Group (
) is an international education company headquartered in vibrant Vancouver, British Columbia. Registered and certified by the British Columbia Ministry of Education, the group comprises three distinct educational divisions: Canada Star Secondary School (an elite private school for grades 10–12), Windsor Hall (an IB World School for grades 6–9) and Can-Star Academy (after-school tutoring programs). Guided by our motto “Confidence, Perseverance, Passion, Inclusion,” we are committed to nurturing students' holistic development and preparing them to become tomorrow’s global leaders.

Job Summary:



We are seeking a motivated and highly organized Customer Service and Operations Specialist to be the primary point of contact for our clients. This role is central to our operations, involving handling inbound leads, driving sales, managing customer billing and payments, scheduling logistics, and coordinating with our drivers and partners. Collaborate effectively and professionally with owners, the driver, and partner company contacts.



Job Requirements

Experience: 1-3 years preferred in Customer Service, Sales, Dispatch, Operations Support, or similar roles. Proven success in CS and/or Sales is a significant advantage.

Collaborative team player, able to work effectively with the driver and owners.

Open and receptive to feedback.



Technical: Stable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional home office environment suitable for VoIP calls.

title: Social Media Management
description:
Social Media Manager

Personal Brand | Kelli Musa

100% Remote · Philippines-Based · PHP 45,000–85,000/month DOE

Part-Time Start (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time Growth Path Available



 WHO WE ARE

I’m Kelli Musa — functional medicine practitioner, Harvard-credentialed nutrition specialist, peptide therapy expert, and founder of The Metabolic Code. I speak on stages. I build programs that change women’s health outcomes. I have a point of view that is sharp, clinical, and deeply personal.

My content needs to reflect that. That’s why I’m hiring.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS

This is not a post-and-ghost job. I’m looking for a Social Media Manager who understands brand-building at a strategic level — someone who could reverse-engineer any creator’s growth in an afternoon and tell me exactly why it’s working.

If Jen Gottlieb, Alex Hormozi, and Dr. Gabrielle Lyon had a baby and that baby became a Social Media Manager — that’s who I’m looking for.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 ? Manage and execute our Instagram content calendar — Reels, Carousels, Stories — with zero hand-holding

 ? Write captions in my voice: bold, clinical authority meets best-friend energy

 ? Produce polished Canva assets from creative briefs — editorial, not template-y

 ? Schedule content through SocialBee and maintain a clean content tracker

 ? Manage DM automation flows in ManyChat or GoHighLevel — keeping the “D
TABOLIC” funnel converting

 ? Research trending audio, hooks, and formats and bring me ideas before I ask

 ? Analyze performance and tell me the truth — with data to back it up



WHAT YOU ACTUALLY KNOW

Platform Intelligence:

 ? Instagram’s algorithm at a mechanical level — not “post consistently” advice

 ? The difference between brand-building content and conversion content — and when to use each

 ? How Reels are structured to retain attention: hook, pattern interrupt, payoff

Content & Copy:

 ? You write in other people’s voices without losing what makes them distinct

 ? Your captions move people — they don’t just inform, they compel

 ? You understand that in health and wellness, trust is the entire product

Tools (required):

 ? Canva — Advanced level

 ? SocialBee, Later, or equivalent scheduler

 ? ManyChat or GoHighLevel for DM automation

 ? CapCut or InShot for basic Reels editing

 ? Google Drive and Sheets for content management



WHAT WILL MAKE YOU STAND OUT

 ? You’ve grown or significantly scaled a personal brand Instagram account

 ? You can name a creator killing it right now and explain exactly why their content works

 ? You’ve managed DM funnels that connect organic content to actual bookings or sales

 ? You’ve written content for a health or wellness brand

 ? You follow Jen Gottlieb, Alex Hormozi, or Dr. Gabrielle Lyon — and can speak intelligently about their content strategy



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF…

 ? You need to be told what to post and when

 ? You treat deadlines as suggestions

 ? Your portfolio is all branded quotes with no strategy behind it

 ? You think “pwede na” is good enough

 ? You’ve never studied why content works — you just make it and hope



COMPENSATION & WHAT WE OFFER

 ? $800 – $1,450 USD/month (?45,000 – ?85,000) based on experience — well above PH market average

 ? 100% remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

 ? Flexible schedule — no late-night calls, built around Philippine time zones

 ? Performance bonuses when content hits growth milestones

 ? 13th month pay

 ? Long-term position — this is not a one-month project

 ? Real creative input — your ideas will be heard, tested, and credited

 ? Direct access to a US-based founder who communicates with respect and pays on time

 ? Clear growth path to full-time with increased responsibility and pay



HOW TO APPLY

Send the following — missing items = automatic pass:

 1. Open with: “I read every word”

 2. 3–5 sentence intro: who you are, what you specialize in, and why this role

 3. 2–3 content examples you’ve created or managed — Reels, carousels, captions (links or screenshots)

 4. Name one Instagram account (not yours) that is executing personal brand content exceptionally well right now — and tell me in 2–3 sentences WHY

 5. Your current tools stack

 6. Available hours per week and earliest start date

 7. Expected monthly rate in USD or PHP

Filipino VAs built this industry. I want the best one on my team.

— Kelli Musa | 2026



? Filipino VAs are some of the most talented social media professionals in the world. This role was built for you. ?

 



Let's Be Real About What This Is

This is not a job for someone who learned social media by taking a course last year

**Description:**



We need sales professionals to introduce US companies to a platform that makes hiring international talent simple.



THE PRODUCT



O1dMatch is a job matching platform where US employers can find and hire exceptional international professionals without sponsoring visas.



How it works:

Employers browse pre-vetted talent profiles (engineers, researchers, executives)

AI scores each candidate on O-1 visa eligibility

Employers send a one-click interest letter to candidates they want

The talent uses those letters to file their own visa — employer does nothing else



The value proposition is clear: access world-class talent with zero visa hassle.



YOUR ROLE



Identify US companies struggling to hire technical talent

Pitch O1dMatch as the solution

Close deals and earn commission on every paying employer

 (code: BONUS100)

title: Lead Generation Specialist - Employer Acquisition
description:
**Title:** Lead Generation Specialist - US Tech Companies (Remote, Performance-Based Pay)



**Description:**



We are looking for lead generation specialists to identify and qualify US employers for our international talent platform.



WHAT IS O1DMATCH



O1dMatch connects US employers with international professionals who qualify for O-1 extraordinary ability visas.



The platform works like this:

International talent creates profiles showcasing their credentials

AI evaluates their O-1 visa eligibility

US employers browse profiles and send interest letters with one click

Talent uses those letters in their visa application — employers do not sponsor



Employers get access to top-tier global talent. Talent gets employer support for their visa. Everyone wins.



YOUR ROLE



Research and identify US tech companies actively hiring

Build lists of decision-makers (HR, hiring managers, founders)

Conduct initial outreach via
 and LinkedIn

Earn performance-based pay for qualified leads and closed deals

You must understand the platform before you can sell it.

How does the talent side work?

How does the employer side work?

What makes this different from traditional recruiting?

Describe the platform in your own words (2-3 sentences)

List 5 types of US companies that would benefit from this

Describe how you would find and reach decision-makers at these companies



Strong reports get interviews. We will discuss pay structure with qualified candidates.



PLATFORM: 

ACCESS CODE: BONUS100

title: Video Editor (Cantonese Content)
description:
Job Description

About the Role

We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our content team on a freelance/project basis. You will be editing Cantonese-language videos for our brand/channel. Don't worry if you don't speak Cantonese — we will provide full English translation scripts so you can follow the content and edit accurately.

Responsibilities



Edit raw footage into polished, publish-ready videos

Follow provided English translation scripts to understand content flow and pacing

Add subtitles, captions, lower thirds, and on-screen text as directed

Sync audio and video, adjust pacing and cuts for natural flow

Apply colour grading, transitions, and visual effects as needed

Incorporate brand assets (logos, intros/outros, music) per our style guide

Deliver files in specified formats and resolutions (e.g. 1080p, 4K, 9:16, 16:9)

Revise edits based on feedback in a timely manner



Requirements

Proven experience in video editing (portfolio or sample work required)

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut

Ability to work from translation scripts — no Cantonese language skills needed

Strong sense of timing, pacing, and storytelling

Reliable internet connection and ability to handle large video files

Good communication skills in English

Able to meet deadlines consistently



Nice to Have

Experience editing social media content (YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok)

Motion graphics or After Effects skills

Experience working with multilingual or dubbed content



What We Provide

Raw footage + full English translation/transcript for every video

Brand style guide and asset kit

Clear brief for each project

Timely feedback and payment

title: Founding SDR / Business Development Specialist
description:
Company: Ledger Lane

Employment Type: Full-time

Location: Remote



About Ledger Lane

Ledger Lane is a new accounting brand being launched to support businesses outside of the NDIS sector. Our goal is to diversify our services and work with growing businesses across industries such as retail, cafés, hospitality, and professional services.

We are building a high-performing Sales Development team to help launch and scale the business. This role is an opportunity to join as one of the founding tea
mbers and play a key role in shaping the growth strategy of the company.



About the Role

We are looking for a top-performing Sales Development Representative (SDR) who will help build the foundation of our sales pipeline. This is not a typical SDR role — you will help launch the brand, develop outreach strategies, build lead databases, and contribute to the overall business growth plan.

You will work closely with the leadership team to identify opportunities, create systems, and generate qualified leads for the business.



Key Responsibilities

Build and maintain a high-quality database of cold leads across target industries (retail, cafés, hospitality, professional services, etc.)

Develop and execute cold outreach strategies 
, LinkedIn, calls, and other channels)

Identify and qualify potential clients for Ledger Lane accounting services

Assist with launch strategy and go-to-market planning

Contribute ideas for website development, messaging, and positioning

Research target markets and identify business opportunities

Schedule and coordinate discovery calls with prospective clients

Maintain CRM systems and track outreach activity and results

Work closely with leadership to refine the sales process



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who is proactive, strategic, and capable of helping build something from the ground up.

Preferred experience includes:

Sales Development Representative (SDR), Business Development, or Lead Generation roles

Experience working with or selling to retail, café, hospitality, or small business sectors

Familiarity with the accounting or financial services industry is a strong advantage

Experience with cold outreach, CRM systems, and database building

Strong research and prospecting skills

Ability to work independently and take initiative

Key Skills

Lead generation and prospecting

Cold outreach and sales communication

Strategic thinking and market research

CRM and sales pipeline management

Strong written and verbal communication

Self-motivated and results-driven



Why Join Ledger Lane?

Be part of a founding team launching a new brand

Opportunity to help build and shape the sales strategy

Long-term growth potential as the SDR team expands

Work directly with leadership on a high-impact project

title: SMSF Administration Officer
description:
About the role



The Superannuation Administration role is responsible for maintenance of financial data, accurate and timely administrative services across various superannuation schemes and products for our clients.



The role is accountable for ensuring that the activities completed complies with the agreed procedures, priorities and meets service levels.



The position requires the completion of daily key responsibilities specifically opening, scanning, indexing and distributing of incoming and outgoing mail, including client account maintenance, processing simple client registry tasks and general administrative support as required.



Key Responsibilities

Administrative duties including scanning and indexing incoming mail and distribution of outgoing mail.

Processing basic client registry tasks.

Monitor and track requests.

Preparation of Engagement Letters, collating newsletters, ordering title documents.

Ensuring data base of clients is up to date; Using CAS360 for any client address changes to produce forms, send for signature and ensure lodgement.

Liaise with ATO as required for lodgement deferrals, Payment arrangements and follow ups between all stakeholders

Maintain accurate records and ensure data integrity across platforms

Utilize Microsoft 365 tools (Excel, Outlook, Teams, SharePoint) for reporting, communication, and collaboration.

Assist in process improvement initiative and automation using BGL and 0365 capabilities



Required Skills & Experience

Minimum 2 years of experience in SMSF administration

Proficiency in BGL Simple Fund 360

Strong working knowledge of Microsoft 365 applications (Excel, Outlook, Teams, SharePoint)

Understanding of superannuation legislation, compliance, and tax requirements

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

Strong communication and interpersonal abilities

Willingness to learn

Ability to work independently and as part of a team

title: E - Commerce Bookkeeper (QuickBooks & Shopify Specialist)
description:
Overview

We are looking for a meticulous and experienced eCommerce Bookkeeper to manage the financial records for our health and wellness brand group. Your primary mission will be to ensure our accounts are investor-ready, reconcile all 2025 data, and prepare our entities for seamless tax filing.



This role requires a specialist who understands the nuances of eCommerce accounting, specifically the integration between Shopify and QuickBooks.



Work Schedule & Compensation

Rate: 4 - 6 USD

Schedule: Flexible time (must reconcile every EST midnight)



Key Responsibilities

Reconciliation: Perform deep reconciliation for the full 2025 financial year to ensure 100?curacy for tax season.

QuickBooks Management: Maintain and optimize QuickBooks (our primary accounting software) as the single source of truth.

eCommerce Accounting: Reconcile Shopify sales, payouts, and transaction fees.

Banking & Platforms: Manage and reconcile transactions across our banking stack, including Wise, Chase Bank, and Slash Financial.

End-of-Month (EOM): Execute full end-of-month procedures, including financial reporting and balance sheet reconciliation.

Process Adherence: Accurately follow established procedure manuals while suggesting improvements to streamline our financial systems.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

QuickBooks Mastery: Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks is essential (Xero/MYOB experience is a bonus but not the focus).

Shopify Proficiency: Deep understanding of Shopify’s backend, specifically regarding financial reporting and payouts.

eCommerce Experience: Proven track record of bookkeeping for physical product brands (DTC).

Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy when handling high-volume transactions across multiple banking platforms.

Reliability: Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to meet strict end-of-month and tax-readiness deadlines.



To Apply

Please fill out the application form: 
/appgWJZPZOmqW3xQl/pagX70SRLuI0D6zJq/form and put OOOBOOKKEEPER in the Job Title.

title: Virtual Assistant for Events & Digital Brands
description:
We’re building some of the most recognised brands in the short term rental and accommodation space across Australia and New Zealand. That means conferences, podcasts, digital platforms, websites, content, and a lot of moving parts.



Right now, we’re looking for a self employed contractor who wants more than a standard VA gig. This is a hands on, fast paced support role sitting at the heart of three growing brands:



* STRIVE Conference

Industry leading events and awards bringing together property managers, owners, and suppliers across Australia, New Zealand, and beyond.



* The Accommodation Show

A long running podcast featuring operators, founders, and leaders in hospitality, travel, and short term rentals.



* iBooked.online

A digital agency focused on direct bookings, websites, SEO, and marketing strategy for accommodation businesses.



If you enjoy variety, problem solving, and being close to the action, you’ll feel right at home.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing



This role is deliberately broad. You’ll touch a lot of areas, without being expected to be an expert in all of them from day one.



Admin and operations

* Managing inboxes and basic diary coordination

* Organising data, lists, and spreadsheets

* Supporting day to day business admin across the brands



Content and marketing support

* Scheduling social media posts across multiple platforms

* Assisting with podcast uploads, episode assets, and show notes

* Helping prepare
 campaigns and announcements

* Light content editing and formatting



Web and tech support

* Simple WordPress edits and page updates

* Uploading content, images, and basic changes

* Working with tools like Google Workspace, social schedulers, and
 platforms



Events support

* Helping coordinate speakers, sponsors, and partners

* Keeping track of assets, deadlines, and comms

* Supporting event logistics before, during, and after delivery



You won’t just be following instructions. You’ll be encouraged to spot gaps, suggest improvements, and contribute ideas for content, campaigns, and processes.



Hours, Flexibility & Setup



* Around 20 to 60 hours per week

* Spread across 5 to 6 days

* Fully remote and flexible

* Work to your own rhythm, as long as things get done



This suits freelancers who like consistent work without being locked into rigid hours.



Who This Is Great For



This role is ideal if you:



* Are a freelancer or contractor looking for a long term client

* Enjoy variety rather than doing the same task all day

* Like hospitality, travel, marketing, media, or tech

* Want exposure to events and the short term rental industry

* Are organised, detail oriented, and proactive



You’ll be working with people and brands across Australia and New Zealand, and you’ll build genuine industry connections along the way.



Skills We’re Looking For



* Strong written English

* Confidence with Google Workspace

* Comfortable with social media tools

* Basic WordPress experience

* Good internet connection and a solid home setup

* Curious mindset and willingness to learn



You don’t need to know everything upfront. You do need to be reliable, switched on, and comfortable juggling priorities.



Growth & Pay



As your role expands and your impact grows, your rates will grow too. This is a relationship we want to invest in, not a short term stop gap.



How to Apply



Send us:



* A short intro about you

* A link to something you’ve worked on that you’re proud of

* Your hourly or project based rate



If you like being close to the action and want to grow alongside brands that are genuinely building something in this space, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Personal Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Personal Assistant / Executive Assistant to help manage day-to-day scheduling, communications, and administrative support. This role is ideal for someone who is dependable, proactive, and able to keep multiple moving pieces organized at once.



The right person should be extremely strong with organization, comfortable coordinating across different calendars, and confident managing meetings and calls across multiple time zones. A strong understanding of Pacific Time and Philippine Time is especially important for this role.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage calendars, appointments, meetings, and calls

Schedule and coordinate across multiple time zones, especially Pacific Time and Philippine Time

Organize workflows, tasks, and follow-ups to keep operations running smoothly

Use Microsoft/Google Teams confidently for communication, scheduling, and coordination

Assist with
 management, communication, and follow-up

Provide light support related to social media marketing and digital communications

Help maintain structure, timelines, and organization across ongoing projects



Ideal Candidate:

Extremely organized and detail-oriented

Strong experience with scheduling and calendar management

Comfortable coordinating calls and meetings across different time zones

Proficient with Microsoft Teams

Has some knowledge of social media marketing and
 communication

Excellent written and spoken English

Strong comprehension skills and the ability to understand instructions clearly

Professional, reliable, and proactive

Able to adapt quickly and keep track of multiple priorities at once



What We’re Looking For Most:

Above all, we need someone with excellent English, strong comprehension, and exceptional organizational skills. This person should be able to communicate clearly, understand nuanced instructions, and help bring structure to a fast-moving workflow.

If you are highly organized, a strong communicator, and comfortable working across different time zones and administrative tasks, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Amazon
description:
Amazon Operations VA

Remote · $3–$4 / hour USD

Full-time (40 hours per week) | Long-term engagement

About the Role

We are a growing Amazon-focused agency managing multiple Seller Central accounts for a range of client brands. As our operations scale, we need reliable, task-focused support to handle the high-volume, repeatable work that keeps our accounts running smoothly.



This is a task-execution role. You will follow detailed SOPs, written guides, and Loom video walkthroughs to carry out bulk, repeatable tasks accurately and consistently. Precision, and the ability to follow instructions exactly are the most important qualities for this position.



If you take pride in doing careful, methodical work and you enjoy following a clear process without ambiguity, this role is a strong fit.



What You'll Do



Your day-to-day will involve executing high-volume, repeatable tasks inside Amazon Seller Central, following documented step-by-step processes. Core task areas include:



Listing Operations

• Bulk listing updates using flat files and Seller Central's bulk edit tools

• Creating and editing product listings following provided templates and guidelines

• Uploading and formatting product images per provided specifications

• Running keyword research using tools we provide and entering data into structured templates

• Competitor listing data collection and entry 

• Updating backend keywords, bullet points, titles, and descriptions per provided copy

Account Health & Monitoring

• Daily or weekly checks across multiple accounts for listing suppressions, policy flags, or performance alerts

• Logging issues into our internal trackers and following escalation 

• Verifying that backend settings, categories, and attributes match specifications

• Routine auditing of listing content to confirm accuracy after updates



Content & Asset Coordination

• Uploading images and A+ content once approved assets are provided

• Checking image compliance against Amazon's technical requirements

• Keeping asset trackers and content logs up to date



FBA & Inventory Support

• Following SOPs to assist with FBA shipment creation steps

• Monitoring inventory-related dashboards and flagging issues per documented criteria

• Updating inventory notes and trackers as instructed



What We Expect



This role is built around process-following. You do not need to be an Amazon expert — but you do need to be extremely reliable, careful, and consistent. Specifically:



• You read instructions thoroughly before starting any task and ask clarifying questions upfront rather than making assumptions

• You follow SOPs and Loom video guides step by step, even when steps feel repetitive

• You flag anything unclear or unexpected before proceeding, rather than improvising

• You deliver work that is accurate and complete — mistakes from skipping steps or rushing are the most critical failure point in this role

• You communicate in clear, professional written English when logging updates, flagging issues, or asking questions

• You meet deadlines and proactively communicate when timelines are at risk



Qualifications



Required



• Fluent written English — you will read complex SOPs, guides, and instructions daily, and your comprehension must be excellent

• Prior experience working inside Amazon Seller Central (any capacity)

• Comfortable with repetitive, detail-oriented computer-based tasks

• Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work environment

• Ability to follow video and written guides precisely

• Organised and consistent — able to track multiple tasks across several accounts without dropping details



Nice to Have

• Experience with flat file uploads or bulk listing edits

• Previous experience in an Amazon agency or e-commerce support role

• Experience using Asana, Notion, Helium10 

• Comfort following Loom video tutorials as a primary training method



What We Offer

• $3.00–$4.00 USD per hour, paid reliably and on time

• Fully remote 

• Clear, documented processes for every task — no guesswork

• Stable, ongoing engagement with potential to expand your role in the future 

• Training provided via Loom videos and written SOPs before you start any new task type

• Supportive team environment — you will never be left without guidance



How to Apply



To be considered for this role, please submit the following (avoid AI answers):



• A short written introduction (3–5 sentences) about your Amazon Seller Central experience

• Your answer to this question: "Describe a time you had to follow a complex process or set of instructions carefully. What did you do to make sure you did not miss any steps?"

• Your availability (hours per week and time zone)



Applications that are clearly AI or do not include all three items above will not be reviewed. We pay close attention to the quality and clarity of your written English in your application.

title: Project Manager – Author Services
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Project Manager to serve as the primary point of contact for authors throughout the book development and publishing process. This role is responsible for managing all communication, correspondence, and project tasks associated with each author’s manuscript journey—from onboarding through final delivery.



The Project Manager plays a key role in ensuring that authors feel supported, informed, and confident throughout the process while also coordinating timelines, deliverables, and internal team collaboration. The ideal candidate is an excellent communicator with strong organizational skills who can manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail and meeting deadlines.



Key Responsibilities:

Serve as the primary liaison between the author and the internal publishing team

Manage all client communication, correspondence, and follow-ups throughout the lifecycle of the project

Coordinate and track project phases, including manuscript development, editing, design, production, and final delivery

Ensure projects remain on schedule and within scope

Maintain clear documentation of project milestones, deliverables, and client requests

Communicate project updates, timelines, and expectations clearly with authors

Coordinate with internal teams such as editors, designers, and production specialists

Anticipate potential delays or issues and proactively develop solutions

Ensure authors feel supported, informed, and confident throughout the publishing process

Track project progress using project management tools and internal systems



Skills & Qualifications:

Strong command of the English language, including excellent grammar, writing, and proofreading skills

Outstanding written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally with authors and internal teams

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent time management and organizational skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines

Strong ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment

Ability to work independently while coordinating effectively with cross-functional teams

Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking abilities

title: Executive Assistant (Operations-Focused)
description:
We’re seeking a proactive, detail-oriented **Executive Assistant** to support our CEO and leadership team in day-to-day operations, coordination, and special projects.



This role covers core EA responsibilities—managing inboxes, calendars, CRMs, and documentation—but goes beyond that. We’re looking for someone who can take initiative, think independently, and help drive operational and strategic tasks forward with minimal guidance.



Ideal candidates are early in their career, hungry to learn, AI-curious, and excited to grow in a fast-paced digital marketing agency environment.



---



### **Core Responsibilities**



**Executive Support**



- Manage the CEO’s inbox and calendar efficiently, prioritizing key communications

- Draft and send routine correspondence independently

- Track follow-ups to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



**CRM & Sales Support**



- Maintain HubSpot, keeping pipelines and records accurate

- Support client onboarding documentation and coordination

- Track sales stages and update relevant data



**Documentation & Contracts**



- Draft MSAs, NDAs, and basic agreements using templates

- Coordinate signatures and maintain organized contract records



---



### **Growth Opportunities**



As you gain experience, you’ll also:



- Take ownership of operational tasks from start to finish

- Research vendors, tools, and processes, providing actionable recommendations

- Support project coordination across marketing, sales, and operations

- Streamline workflows using AI and automation tools

- Help implement systems to reduce manual work and boost efficiency



---



### **Who We’re Looking For**



**Mindset & Attitude**



- Energetic, resourceful, and proactive

- Comfortable in a fast-moving startup or agency environment

- Strong sense of ownership and accountability

- Eager to learn and grow



**Skills & Requirements**



- Excellent written and spoken English (C2 level)

- Willing to work EST hours

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable working independently

- Strong digital literacy



**Bonus Skills**



- Experience with HubSpot or other CRMs

- Familiarity with automation tools (Zapier, Notion, etc.)

- Interest in AI beyond basic tools like ChatGPT



---



### **Compensation & Benefits**



- Fully remote role

- Opportunity to grow into broader operations or strategic responsibilities over time



---



### **How to Apply**



Please submit:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **Loom introduction video** sharing your relevant experience and why this role excites you



If you’re organized, proactive, and energized by supporting a fast-paced team while learning operations from the ground up, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Cold Email Inbox Manager (Full-Time, Night Shift)
description:
Cold
 Inbox Manager (Full-Time, Night Shift)



We run cold
 campaigns (for us, not clients!) and we're looking for a reliable, full-time inbox manager to handle reply management during US business hours (night shift PH time).



What you'll actually be doing:



Monitoring inboxes across multiple campaigns, categorizing replies, flagging interested leads immediately, and responding using a template-plus-tweak approach — you'll personalize the opening line to directly reflect what the prospect actually said, so replies feel human and relevant rather than copy-pasted.



Our one golden metric: reply time.



We expect every interested lead to receive a response in under 10 minutes. We've built a custom dashboard specifically to track this. If someone expresses interest and waits 45 minutes to hear back, we've already lost ground — you'll understand why this matters and take it seriously.



You're a great fit if:



  -  You've done cold
 inbox management before — ideally in PlusVibe (tell us about it)

  -  You understand what a good reply vs. a bad reply looks like, and why it matters

  -  You have a good enough command of English to write a natural, personalized opening line

  -  You're reliable, self-directed, and treat night shift like a real job

  - You have a stable internet connection and a dedicated work setup — this is non-negotiable given the sub-10min reply standard

  - You don't need to be micromanaged to stay on top of things



To apply: We use an async audio interview process. Instructions will be sent after you express interest. If that format doesn't work for you, this role probably isn't the right fit.

title: Full-Stack Laravel + Webflow Developer (E-Commerce & Design Sites)
description:
About the Role

EuroHome Interiors is a modern European furniture and interior design brand serving U.S. clients. Our stack includes:

- A live Laravel e-commerce furniture site (with images stored on AWS S3)

- A Webflow-based design/marketing site we are building and expanding



We need a full-stack developer who is strong in both Laravel and Webflow – capable of front-end and back-end work, and comfortable owning integrations, logic, and UI. We are not looking for 'willing to learn.' We want someone with real, live Webflow and Laravel experience.

Key Responsibilities

- Review, clean up, and improve our existing Laravel e-commerce site (structure, performance, security).

- Develop new back-end features: product variations, pricing logic, APIs, and integrations.

- Implement data-driven and conditional behavior on the front end (Blade, JS, etc.).

- Work with AWS/S3 for product image storage and delivery.

- Build and maintain our design website in Webflow (layouts, CMS, custom code embeds, interactions, responsive behavior).

- Ensure consistent UX and branding between Webflow and our Laravel site.

- Use Git and follow modern development best practices.

Must-Have Requirements

- 2+ years hands-on experience with PHP + Laravel in production (not just school or tutorials).

- Proven Webflow experience – at least 2 live sites you built or heavily developed (front end, CMS, basic logic/integrations).

- Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, REST APIs, and MySQL.

- Experience with Git (GitHub / GitLab).

- Good English communication.

- Comfortable working full-time on U.S. Eastern Time (graveyard).

Nice to Have

- Experience with AWS, especially S3 (image storage and delivery).

- E-commerce / product configurator experience.

How to Apply

Please send a message with:



1) Your answers

- One Laravel project: What did it do, what was your role, and what was the hardest technical problem you solved?

- One Webflow project: What did you build (front end + CMS/integrations), and what are you most proud of?

- Do you have experience working on U.S. Eastern Time? Can you do this long term?



2) Your links

- 2–4 live Webflow sites you built or heavily worked on (explain your role on each).

- Any live Laravel projects (if available).

- Your GitHub/GitLab or a Laravel code sample that reflects your usual style.



Subject line:

EuroHome Full-Stack Laravel + Webflow Developer – [Your Full Name]



Send the
 to 



We’re looking for someone who wants long-term ownership of our Laravel platform, Webflow site, and AWS-based image stack—not just short-term task work.

title: STATIC IMAGE DESIGNER
description:
Before you apply, read every word.

We're a fast-scaling brand.

We run paid ads across multiple markets.

And we need a Static Image Designer who understands one thing:

Pretty doesn't sell. Designed-to-convert does.

If you make things that look nice but don't think about the hook, the copy placement, the thumb-stop 
nt, this isn't for you.

What the job is:

You receive a brief (avatar, angle, copy). You deliver a high-converting static ad image. Clean. Bold. Built for Meta feeds.

What we need:

? Strong eye for direct response design (hierarchy, contrast, emotion)

? AI tools fluency is mandatory, Midjourney, Firefly, Canva AI, or whatever you use. We don't care which. But you must use them actively and show us how.

? Able to work fast, turnaround matters

? Available for recurring weekly work

You're NOT a fit if:

? Your portfolio is logos and branding decks

? You've never designed a paid ad before

? You don't use AI in your design process

? You send a generic application



The Hiring Process:



Trial Task: We send you a brief. You deliver 1 static ad concept within 24h. Unpaid. Shows us your speed, thinking, and output quality.

Paid Project Trial: Real campaign asset. If it performs, we move forward.

One-Month Paid Trial: Weekly deliverables with feedback loops.

Long-Term Offer: Consistent performers join the core team.





HOW TO APPLY

We will ignore any message that doesn't follow this structure exactly.

No intro paragraphs. No PDFs. No "please find attached." Just this:



1. Full Name:

2. Age:

3. Country / City:

4. Years of experience in ad/performance design:

5. AI tools you actively use (be specific, name them and how you use them):

6. Link to 2-3 static ad examples from past work (not general portfolio, ad creatives only):

7. One sentence: what makes your ads actually convert?

8. Loom Video or a voice record (introduce yourself, walk us through one of your past ad designs and explain the decisions you made):



Apply with that exact format.

Wrong format = ignored.

Right format = you hear from us within 48 hours.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Appraisal Support Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant to support a growing real estate appraisal business. The role focuses on administrative support, scheduling, data entry, and assisting with appraisal report preparation.



This position is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with structured data and real estate information.



Experience with appraisal software such as Total by a la mode is helpful but not required. Training will be provided.



Work Schedule & Compensation

My business operates in the U.S. Central Time Zone.



Some work can be completed outside my working hours, but you must be available most weekdays during Central Time business hours for communication and coordination.



This position is salary-based at $1,000 per month.



The role is expected to take approximately 40 hours per week once training is complete.



If workload consistently exceeds 50 hours per week, I will consider hiring an additional support person unless you prefer the additional hours.



If business is slow or we stop work early on certain days, your pay will not be reduced.



Expected Production

The expected production level is approximately:



40–50 appraisal reports per month



Currently the business averages 30–35 reports per month.



The purpose of this role is to free up my time so I can focus on growing the business and increasing report volume.



Success Metrics



Your performance will be evaluated based on:

Accuracy

Reports must be entered carefully and correctly.



Communication

You should regularly communicate:



• what has been completed

• what still needs to be done

• any questions or issues



Client Responsiveness



Clients should not need to follow up repeatedly for updates regarding:



• inspection scheduling

• report status

• revisions



Business Growth

A major measure of success will be whether freeing up my time allows the business to increase the number of appraisal assignments completed.



Additional Responsibilities

In addition to my appraisal business, I also operate a real estate sales business.



After you become efficient with appraisal tasks, I may occasionally ask for help with real estate transaction tasks as well.



Application Questions:



To apply for this position, please answer the questions below in your application message. Applications that do not answer all questions will not be reviewed.



1. Experience

Which best describes your experience?



A) I have used Total by a la mode for appraisal reports

B) I have worked in real estate but not with appraisal software

C) I have Virtual Assistant or administrative experience

D) None of the above but I am willing to learn



If you selected A, briefly describe the tasks you performed inside Total.



2. Inspection Scheduling Message

Write a short message to a homeowner requesting to schedule an appraisal inspection.



The message should:



• introduce yourself as the appraiser's assistant

• explain why you are contacting them

• ask for their availability to schedule the inspection



Keep the message professional and concise.



3. Client Update

Write an
 to a client explaining:



• the inspection is scheduled for Friday at 10:00 AM

• the appraisal report will be delivered within 48 hours after the inspection



4. Client Instructions Message

A private client has hired the appraiser and must complete two steps before the appraisal can begin:



• sign the engagement letter

• submit payment



Write a message explaining the next steps clearly and professionally.



5. Morning Update Message

Imagine you are sending me a message at the start of the workday.



Write a short update explaining:



• what appraisal reports are currently in progress

• what tasks need my attention today

• anything that has changed or needs a decision



6. End-of-Day Update

Write a short message summarizing the end of the workday.



Include:



• what was completed

• what is still in progress

• any issues or items that need follow-up tomorrow



7. Organization Test

Imagine we currently have 5 appraisal reports in progress.



Two inspections are scheduled today.

One report needs revisions from the lender.

Two reports still need to be written.



Explain how you would organize and track these tasks so nothing gets missed.



8. Problem Solving

If you are preparing part of an appraisal report and notice information that might be incorrect, what would you do?



9. Attention to Detail

Describe three tasks from previous work where accuracy and attention to detail were very important.



10. Work Availability

Please answer honestly:



Are you currently working for other clients?



If yes, how many hours per week?



Are you available during U.S. Central Time business hours for communication?



Final Instruction

At the end of your application include the word:



Valuation



Applications that do not include this word will not be reviewed.

WHAT YOU’LL DO

, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, and Google

Lead Capture + Follow-Up Support

 + phone) and opt-in flow

/SMS) that move leads toward booked consultations



Reporting & Optimization



Track and report paid + organic performance

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Proven experience driving results with social media marketing (paid + organic)



Strong hands-on experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, and YouTube



Experience marketing home services/remodeling/real estate/construction is a strong plus



Demonstrated ability to convert audiences into booked consultations or qualified leads



Clear, practical communication and strong ownership of outcomes



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Increased qualified consultation bookings for kitchen and bath renovation services



Consistent organic follower growth and stronger engagement



Clear performance insights and a repeatable strategy by platform



ENGAGEMENT DETAILS



Pilot-based engagement (extends based on performance)



Short onboarding period



Regular performance reviews and clear targets



Opportunity to expand scope if results are strong

Young Publisher |

mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.
