title: Shopify Product Content & SEO Specialist (Contract)
description:
REPOST: Please Apply Again if Interested. *** Eight Week Project Role with Potential Ongoing Position ***

_____________________________________________________________________



OVERVIEW:

We are seeking a highly detail focused contractor to review and optimise approximately 800 existing Shopify product listings. This is a defined eight week project focused on improving the quality, clarity and SEO performance of existing product pages.



If the project goes well, the working relationship is strong, AND YOU HAVE ADDITIONAL SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE, there may be an opportunity to transition into an ongoing, full-time Marketing & Growth Operations role supporting wider ecommerce and mulit-business marketing activities.



The immediate focus of this role is methodical catalogue optimisation and product page improvement and is a MUST for skillset for successful applicants. 

_____________________________________________________________________



PROJECT SCOPE:

You will work through an existing Shopify catalogue and improve each listing according to an established structure and brand guide. Key tasks include:



• Reviewing product descriptions for clarity, accuracy and logical flow

• Understanding the purpose of each product and correcting inconsistencies

• Adjusting summary information and selecting three key callouts

• Tightening AI generated bullet points and removing repetition or contradictions

• Ensuring formatting consistency across headings, bullets and layout

• Adding internal links where appropriate

• Conducting keyword research relevant to each product

• Adding three SEO FAQs per product

• Checking product images are correct and properly optimised

• Confirming product handles follow naming conventions

• Reviewing and optimising Meta Title and Meta Description

• Validating product information against supplier websites

• Reviewing and optimising collection pages for keyword alignment and internal linking

• Reviewing and optimising legacy blog articles for keyword alignment and internal linking



This role requires someone who can work methodically through a large catalogue while maintaining a high level of attention to detail. There is a project completion bonus of ?12,000 for the successful execution of this task within the agreed timeframe and to the quality standards required.

_____________________________________________________________________



IDEAL EXPERIENCE:

You will be working within an established structure and brand voice and attention to detail is critical and a desire to understand the products and why we are optimising, not just use AI to dump words into the pages.  



• Strong experience with Shopify product management

• Solid understanding of on page SEO 

• Confident conducting keyword research (strategically & tactically)

• Excellent written English

• High attention to detail

• Reliable, methodical and able to work through a defined product list

• Willing to ask questions, push back and seek clarity vs "just doing"

• Good work ethic - no juggling multiple clients / projects

• Motivated to contribute and help a small business grow

• Able to work full
 hours in Australian Time Zone for 8 weeks

_____________________________________________________________________



POTENTIAL FUTURE ROLE:

This short-term gig is a project based catalogue clean up. Because it requires developing a strong understanding of the products we sell, the person who performs well on this project may be a strong candidate for the ongoing role we are hiring for: Marketing & Growth Operations Co-Ordinator.



However, this project represents only one component of the broader role. Appointment to the ongoing position would depend on demonstrating the wider marketing and operational capabilities required. Tasks for the ongoing role:



• eCommerce Product Management inc. on page SEO, new product load

• High-quality content research and writing for social, web and collateral

• Social media content posting and social paid ads management

• Maintaining digital assets and documentation management

• Off-page and local SEO using only white hat techniques

• Assisting with the rollout of marketing initiatives and new business projects

• Converting ideas and notes into structured documents, presentations and marketing materials

• Supporting marketing and growth activities as required across multiple ventures



Please note, this ongoing role would be a full-time, WFH on Australian hours / day shift, hired via an EoR with full benefits and has an expected annual salary including allowances, 13th month etc of approx: ?60,000 before taxes and deductions. 

_____________________________________________________________________



ABOUT THE BUSINESS:

You will be working directly alongside a female founder who runs a number of businesses, and consults to other companies in the area of marketing, franchising and technology. The business has an established team of 5, covering, operations, sales, finance and graphic design, with two staff residing in Cebu. The businesses are in a high growth phase and you would be part of a positive and high performing team. 

_____________________________________________________________________



TO APPLY:

Please share your resume and cover letter explaining your experience, and links to 3 x shopify sites you have managed. Please include the letters OFC in your application. A short video introducing yourself will be highly regarded. If you are intersted in the ongoing role also, please also explain your skills and experience for these additional tasks. Please advise us if you are based in Cebu, as applicants from this area will be highly regarded for the ongoing position to align with team events and training.

title: KDP LAUNCH EXPERT (Full-Stack Publishing & Growth)
description:
Are you an expert at navigating Amazon KDP? Do you know how to take a manuscript and turn it into a bestseller through strategic category placement and management?



We are expanding our brand into the publishing space and need an expert to assist with this expansion on Amazon KDP for digital and print.



Key Responsibilities:



• Launch & SEO: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize organic ranking. Assist with keyword research (7-backend slots), SEO titles, and subtitle optimization using tools like BookBeam, Helium 10, or others.

• Category Strategy: Research and select high-relevance, low-competition categories as a way to help secure the "Bestseller" badges.

• A+ Content & Listings: Design high-converting A+ Content (From the Publisher section), Look Inside optimization, and compelling sales copy that triggers conversions.

• Review Generation: Implement any relevant strategies and automations to build early social proof.

• AMS & Attribution: Manage Amazon Marketing Services (Auto, Keyword, and Product Targeting ads). Use Amazon Attribution to track and reward traffic driven from our TikTok and Shopify channels.



Requirements:



• Proven KDP Launches: A portfolio showing books you have successfully ranked in the Top 100 of their respective categories.

• Ads Mastery: Deep knowledge of AMS (Amazon Advertising) specifically for books.

• Design & Layout: Proficiency in Canva/Photoshop for A+ content.

• Communication: Excellent command of written English.



Additional Information:

• Proof of Work: You must share active KDP links you’ve managed and screenshots of KDP Reports/Ads Manager to verify your role.

• Long-term opportunity to increase your hours, increase your pay, and become a bigger part of the team long-term.



To Apply, You Must:

1) Apply here on OLJ using *5* Apply Points.

2) Fill out this form: 
 

Applications that do not complete items 1 & 2 will not be considered.



If you move to the next steps, you will be asked to participate in a technical interview. During this live session, you will learn about our brand expansion to Amazon KDP and call out exactly how you would prepare and launch our new titles on Amazon.



Please note that the test trial is paid (fixed payment of $5). You will receive more details via
 if you have been selected to do a test trial. A test trial is not a guarantee of further work.



Payment will be made via PayPal or Wise. (MANDATORY FOR CONSIDERATION)



We review applications on a rolling basis and will contact you to do a paid test trial within 48 hours of your application.

title: Content Operations & Creative Performance Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, creative, and analytical Virtual Assistant to become the backbone of our content operations.



This is NOT a basic admin role.



This person will be deeply involved in content performance, organization, creative strategy, analytics breakdowns, hiring support, and visual planning.



If you love content, understand why videos go viral (or flop), and enjoy building systems that make creative teams run smoothly — this role is for you.



???? Role Overview



You will act as:



Content Operations Manager



Performance Analyst



Creative Board Builder



Hiring & Talent Research Assistant



Personal Virtual Assistant



You will work directly with the founder and help bring structure, clarity, and performance optimization to our content machine.



???? Key Responsibilities

1?? Content Operations Management



Organize and maintain editor folders and content databases



Keep assets clean, labeled, and updated



Ensure content workflows stay organized and efficient



Do periodic audits to keep everything streamlined



Identify gaps or bottlenecks in our content systems



2?? Content Performance Tracking & Reporting



Track every video posted



Collect and log analytics weekly



Monitor performance trends across platforms



Identify why videos performed well or underperformed



Create weekly performance breakdowns in Canva or Google Slides



Present actionable recommendations (what to fix, what to double down on)



You must understand:



Hooks



Retention



CTR



Thumbnails



Titles



Audience psychology



Storytelling structure



We don’t just want reports — we want insights.



3?? Creative & Visual Planning



Create visual roadmap boards (Miro boards)



Help structure content strategies visually



Build organized idea boards



Help map out content themes and creative direction



Understand what “good content” looks like



You should be visually creative and structured.



4?? Hiring & Talent Research



Source and vet talent (editors, creatives, etc.)



Create a hiring process



Pre-screen candidates



Organize interviews



Help build systems for evaluating talent



We want someone who understands how to identify quality.



5?? Systems & Accountability



Track weekly improvement goals



Make sure action items are completed



Identify weak areas in content performance



Suggest improvements proactively



Hold the team accountable to performance metrics



???? Ideal Candidate



You are:



Extremely organized



Creative and visually sharp



Analytical and data-driven



Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what to fix)



Detail-oriented



A content nerd (you watch and analyze content naturally)



Comfortable using tools like:



Canva



Google Sheets



Miro



Notion (preferred)



Social media analytics dashboards



Bonus if you:



Have worked with content creators or media brands



Understand YouTube / TikTok performance deeply



Have built performance dashboards before



???? Work Structure



Remote



Part-time to start (with opportunity to grow)



Weekly reporting required



Long-term role for the right person



???? What Success Looks Like



Clean, organized content systems



Clear weekly performance reports



Strategic recommendations



Improved content metrics over time



Strong hiring pipeline



Smooth operational flow



???? To Apply



Please include:



A brief introduction about yourself



Examples of performance reports you’ve created (if any)



Experience with content analytics



Tools you are strongest with



A short breakdown of a viral video and why it worked



Your hourly rate



Your availability (hours per week)



Start your application with the word “Momentum” so we know you read everything.

title: Executive Assistant & Project Coordination Virtual Assistant
description:
EuroHome Interiors is a luxury European furniture and interior design company serving high-end clients in the United States. We are looking for a highly organized and professional Virtual Assistant who can work directly with our leadership team and support daily operations.



This role focuses on executive support, project coordination, and professional communication with clients, vendors, and tea
mbers.



This is not a basic VA position. The person in this role must be confident communicating in English, extremely organized, patient, and able to manage multiple responsibilities while supporting a fast-moving executive.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage Executive’s calendar, meetings, and scheduling with clients, tea
mbers, and applicants

- Coordinate project timelines and track responsibilities across multiple stakeholders

- Communicate professionally with high-end clients, vendors, and contractors

- Assist with interview scheduling and coordination for new hires

- Prepare reports, summaries, and administrative documentation for management

- Organize information, follow-ups, and action items to keep projects on track

- Support special projects and internal coordination as needed



Requirements

- Excellent spoken and written English

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills

- Experience as an Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or Project Coordinator

- Strong calendar management and scheduling experience

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Able to manage multiple priorities and follow through on tasks

- Patient, professional, and able to work with direct communication styles

- Reliable internet and ability to work remotely with a U.S. team

- Must have recent graveyard shift experience supporting U.S. clients (minimum of the last 6 months)



What We Value

We value professionalism, integrity, patience, and strong communication. The right candidate will help keep projects organized, schedules coordinated, and communication clear across our team and clients.

title: Sales Development Specialist (GoHighLevel)
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Sales Development Specialist (SDR)

Location: Remote (Chicago Time Zone preferred)

Hours: Part-Time (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CT) with potential to grow into Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Commission (performance-based incentives)



About the Role

This is not a general admin role. We are looking for a sales-focused, proactive virtual assistant who can:

- Generate leads and fill the sales pipeline

- Cold call and connect with potential clients (especially small law firms)

- Manage communication and onboarding of new clients

- Take ownership of results with minimal supervision

- You will play a critical role in helping the business grow by reaching more potential clients and increasing revenue.



Key Responsibilities

- Conduct outbound calls to potential clients to introduce services

- Generate qualified leads and maintain the sales pipeline in HighLevel CRM

- Assist with client onboarding (Zoom calls, account setup, and workflow guidance) as needed

- Create or adapt outreach scripts and messaging for cold calls and
 campaigns

- Track and report performance metrics: number of calls, qualified leads, and closed clients

- Work independently, creatively, and proactively to solve problems and generate results



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Strong verbal communication skills and confidence on the phone

- Sales-driven mindset with a focus on generating results

- Self-starter: able to work independently without micromanagement

- Creative thinking: able to craft outreach strategies and adapt messaging

- Comfortable with tools like HighLevel CRM and Zoom (experience is a plus)

- Organized and reliable with strong time-management skills

- Motivated by performance and commission-based incentives



Preferred Traits

- Previous experience in sales or business development

- Familiarity with small law firms or professional service industries

- Comfortable working part-time initially, with growth into full-time possible

- Goal-oriented: able to track KPIs and contribute to pipeline growth



Performance Expectations

- Generate at least 2 new clients in the first month (stretch goal: 5)

- Build a growing pipeline of qualified leads

- Take initiative and continuously improve outreach strategies



Why Join the Team?

- Work directly with a business owner in a growth-focused, flexible environment

- Opportunity to take ownership and shape your role

- Earn commission based on performance

- Grow with the business as responsibilities and opportunities expand



How to Apply

Please submit your application including:

1. A brief cover letter introducing yourself and your experience

2. Your resume or CV



Applications without a detailed description of how your skills match the role will not be considered.

title: Project Coordinator – Maintenance & Subcontractor Operations
description:
Project Coordinator – Maintenance & Subcontractor Operations



Department:

SJA Pros



Reports To:

Operations Coordinator



Role Type:

Full-Time, Remote



Position Overview

The Project Coordinator plays a critical role in supporting SJA Pros’ maintenance and restoration operations. This position manages large and complex projects—including insurance-related repairs, mitigation follow-through, and multi-trade maintenance scopes—while also supporting the growth of SJA Pros’ subcontractor network through outreach, vetting, and onboarding.

This role ensures that projects move efficiently from initial assessment to completion, that subcontractors meet SJA Pros’ standards for quality and compliance, and that communication between property managers, owners, technicians, and subcontractors remains consistent and timely.



Key Responsibilities

1. Project Coordination – Large Maintenance & Insurance-Related Projects

Serve as the primary coordinator for high-complexity maintenance projects, including insurance claims, mitigation follow-through, flooring replacements, plumbing repairs, multi-trade reconstruction, and vendor-driven scopes.

Review inspection reports, mitigation summaries, scopes of work, and adjuster correspondence to determine next steps and required trades.

Create, assign, and track work orders within ClickUp, maintaining accurate documentation, photos, notes, and schedule updates.

Coordinate with mitigation vendors, adjusters, and specialty trades to ensure timely sequencing of repair phases.

Prepare complete scope packets for subcontractors, including photos, diagrams, itemized task lists, and required materials.

Communicate with owners, property managers, and tenants regarding timelines, access needs, approvals, and project status.

Monitor project progress, follow up on delays, and escalate issues when required.

Verify completion of work, review technician notes and photos, and ensure all tasks are closed out according to SJA Pros standards.

Support invoicing by confirming that completed work matches the approved scope and that all documentation is properly uploaded.



2. Subcontractor Outreach, Vetting & Onboarding

Conduct ongoing outreach to expand SJA Pros’ network of qualified subcontractors across all trades.

Vet potential subcontractors by reviewing licensing, business registration, COIs, specialty licenses (e.g., electrical, plumbing), W-9s, and references.

Request and review pricing sheets, hourly rates, diagnostic fees, and wholesale pricing when applicable.

Ensure all subcontractors meet SJA Pros’ policy requirements—including no location-based trip fees and adherence to Property Meld communication standards.

Onboard approved subcontractors, ensuring they understand SJA Pros’ workflow, expectations, documentation standards, and communication requirements.

Maintain an organized subcontractor database with up-to-date contact information, service areas, specialties, and pricing.

Track subcontractor performance, quality, reliability, and responsiveness to inform future assignment decisions.

Support the Director and Manager in assigning new work opportunities based on performance and capacity.



3. Communication & Coordination Support

Serve as a liaison between Property Managers, tenants, owners, subcontractors, and internal teams.

Draft clear, professional
s to owners and subcontractors regarding repairs, approvals, scheduling, and project updates.

Provide timely follow-ups and document all communication within ClickUp or Property Meld.

Assist with weekly project reviews, internal operations meetings, and coordination updates.



4. Compliance, Documentation & Quality Standards

Ensure all work adheres to SJA Pros standards, Washington State safety requirements, and any specialty trade code compliance.

Maintain meticulous documentation—including photos, moisture logs, inspection notes, and technician updates—for insurance-related projects.

Verify that subcontractors follow safety protocols, professional conduct standards, and SJA Pros’ expectations for tenant interaction.

Support the team in identifying process improvements and updating SOPs to streamline project coordination workflows.





Qualifications

Experience in property management, construction coordination, restoration, or maintenance operations preferred.

Knowledge of insurance claims, mitigation, and multi-trade coordination is a strong plus.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to juggle multiple projects and deadlines.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Ability to build strong relationships with subcontractors and internal teams.

Detail-oriented, process-driven, and comfortable following structured workflows.

Ability to learn quickly, solve problems, and adapt to changing priorities.





Success in This Role Looks Like

Projects run smoothly with minimal delays and complete documentation.

Subcontractors are responsive, reliable, properly vetted, and aligned with SJA Pros’ standards.

Owners and property managers receive timely updates and clear expectations.

Work orders are accurately assigned, tracked, and closed with professional documentation.

Insurance-related jobs include full compliance, detailed photos, and accurate records.

The subcontractor network grows in coverage, quality, and specialization.







HOW TO APPLY

Please send a copy of your resume along with the the following:



1. Self-Introduction Video: Please record a short video (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself, highlighting your relevant experience, and answering the following question: What unique strengths do you feel you would bring to this role? 



2. Typing Test Result: Please complete a typing test and share the results with us. You can use any online typing test platform of your choice.



3. Internet Speed Test Result: Please perform an internet speed test and provide the results, particularly if the interview will be conducted virtually. You can use websites like speedtest.net for this purpose.



We look forward to getting to know you better and discussing how you can contribute to our team.

title: Clinical Operations Manager (RN) — US-Facing (Remote, Philippines)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION  



Role: Clinical Operations Manager (RN) — US-Facing (Remote, Philippines)

We’re a US home care company hiring a single leader to run day-to-day operations and confidently communicate with families about diagnoses/care plans based on provider notes and documentation. You will manage people, workflows, recruiting, compliance, and customer success—while keeping a high standard of empathy, clarity, and US-culture communication.



Key Responsibilities



Leadership & Management



Lead and manage the Operations team (training, coaching, performance, accountability)



Run daily/weekly team cadence (standups, 1:1s, quality reviews, escalations)



Create and enforce SOPs/workflows; improve efficiency and consistency



Clinical / Family Communication (RN-level)



Speak with families about diagnoses, care plans, and next steps based on clinical documentation



Translate medical language into clear, calm, family-friendly explanations



Identify risk and escalate appropriately to clinical/provider leadership



Compliance & Quality



Ensure HIPAA-aligned handling of patient information and documentation standards



Own QA checks, audit readiness, i
/escalation process, and continuous improvement



Recruiting & People Ops



Help recruit and hire tea
mbers (screening, interviews, onboarding, training)



Maintain role scorecards, interview rubrics, onboarding checklists



Customer Success + Sales Support



Own client/family experience operations: response time, clarity, follow-through



Improve retention through strong onboarding and communication



Support sales handoffs and operational readiness (capacity, process clarity)



Requirements (Must-have)



Philippines Registered Nurse (RN) (active license preferred)



Strong medical knowledge and confidence discussing diagnoses/care plans from records



Excellent spoken English (neutral/US-facing accent) and US-culture communication



Proven leadership (team lead/supervisor/manager/program manager/QA/training leader)



Highly organized; strong judgment; calm under pressure; great follow-through



Preferred



US healthcare experience (home care, telehealth, clinic ops, insurance, healthcare BPO)



Familiar with EMR/EHR tools and clinical documentation workflows



Comfortable working US hours (at least partial overlap)



Schedule / Work Setup



Full-time remote, 40 hours/week



Must overlap with US business hours for meetings/escalations



How to Apply



Start your application with the words: “CLINICAL OPS” and include:



A 2–3 minute voice recording introduction (English)



Your RN background + leadership experience



Example of explaining a diagnosis to a family (brief)

title: Part-Time Email Outreach & Lead Nurture VA (Music Industry)
description:
We help gigging musicians (wedding bands, corporate event musicians, soloists, DJs) book more and better-paid private events through training, community, and a profile platform called 
 where musicians can showcase their act and get discovered.



We already have a working cold
 system (using Instantly) and a growing list of musicians. Our open and reply rates are strong. The bottleneck now is fast, organized, consistent follow-up with people who reply.



That’s where you come in.



Role Overview (Part-Time: 4 hours/day, 5 days/week)



Your main job is to turn replies into results:



- Check our Instantly
 inbox daily

- Tag and organize every reply (interested / later / questions / not a fit)

- Send follow-up
s using templates and your own judgment

- Keep a simple tracking sheet updated (status, last touch, next touch)

- Do basic lead research to add new qualified musician
s to our list



You are not doing high-pressure sales. You are doing smart, polite, consistent lead nurture: fast responses, personalized follow-ups, and clear next steps.



Key Outcomes: (How we’ll measure success)



- 100% of new replies tagged and handled the same day

- Warm leads receive a thoughtful response within 12 hours

- Consistent number of new musician profiles created on 
 each week

- Clean, accurate tracking sheet so no interested lead is forgotten



Daily Tasks:



- Log into Instantly and process all new replies

- Choose & send the correct follow-up template based on lead type

- Lightly personalize messages (using their name, act type, situation)

- Update lead statuses and next follow-up date in our sheet/CRM

- Spend remaining time building new lists of musicians from directories, websites, and Instagram (we’ll give SOPs)



Requirements:



- Strong written English and professional
 tone

- Experience with any of: cold
, appointment setting, lead generation, or customer support

- High attention to detail and reliable daily execution

- Comfortable working with simple tools (Google Sheets,
, basic CRMs)

- Stable internet and ability to work on a consistent daily schedule (PH time)



Nice to Have: (but not required)



- Experience in BPO, sales support, or appointment setting

- Familiarity with Instantly or other cold
 tools

- Interest in music or events (weddings, corporate, live gigs)



How to Apply:



Do NOT send a generic application.



Fill out this short application form: 



In the form, you’ll be asked to:



- Share your experience with lead follow-up / appointment setting

- Write a sample reply to a musician who says, “This looks interesting, but I’m too busy to set up another profile right now.”

- Confirm your available hours (PH time) and desired hourly rate



We’ll start with a paid trial (first 2 weeks) focused on responsiveness, quality of replies, and attention to detail. If it’s a good fit for both of us, this will be a long-term, stable role where you can grow with the business.



Thank you!

title: Senior Video Editor – Direct Response Creative
description:
Senior Video Editor – Direct Response Creative — Remote | $1,100–$1,500/month + Performance Bonuses



Most video editing jobs have you cutting the same corporate talking heads on repeat. Same templates. Same briefs. Same lifeless content that nobody watches.



This is not that job.



We're Whiskey Library — a bourbon subscription brand shipping mystery boxes to 4,000+ members across the U.S. We work with 400+ craft distilleries, and our content has one job: make people stop scrolling, watch, and buy. If your ad doesn't convert, it doesn't matter how pretty it looks.



We're looking for a senior video editor who wants to learn (or already knows) how to create short-form ads that actually drive revenue — not just rack up views.



Why This Role Is Different



You won't be buried under a creative director who rewrites everything. You'll work directly with the founders and our creative strategist. Your edits go live on Meta and TikTok — and you'll see exactly how they perform. When your ad crushes it, you get paid more. Simple as that.



Flexible schedule. We care about output, not clocking hours. Work when you're sharpest, as long as there's overlap with US EST for feedback loops.



Independent work. We give you the brief, the footage, and the framework. You own the edit. No micromanagement, no hovering.



Performance bonuses. When your ad performs well in a direct-response setting (high CTR, strong ROAS), you earn more on top of your base pay. Your best work directly increases your income.



Real growth path. Start as a senior. Prove yourself and move up. Our best editors become creative leads who concept entire campaigns, not just cut footage.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing 15–60 second vertical video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok

Selecting the strongest clips from raw UGC footage and building scroll-stopping hooks in the first 3 seconds

Following proven ad structures: Hook ? Problem ? Solution ? CTA

Adding captions, music, sound effects, and transitions that feel native to the platform (not over-produced)

Producing multiple variations of each ad (different hooks, different CTAs) for A/B testing

Taking feedback quickly, iterating same-day, and improving with every round



Who You Are



You've made short-form videos before — even if just for yourself, your friends, or a personal TikTok/Reels account

You understand clip selection and pacing instinctively. You know a boring clip when you see one

You're eager to learn the difference between content that looks good and content that actually sells

You have reliable internet and access to editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or Final Cut Pro)

You communicate clearly. If you hit a wall, you say so instead of going silent

You can work US EST hours (full-time, 40 hours/week)



Compensation



Base: $1,100–$1,500 USD/month

Performance bonuses tied to ad results. When your creative drives strong metrics, you earn additional pay on top of your base.

Pay increases as you level up. Prove consistent output and quality, and your rate grows.

100% remote, flexible hours (with EST overlap for feedback).



How to Apply



To be considered, you must complete the following:



Fill out our application form and complete the trial task: 



The form includes a short editing assignment. You'll receive access to raw unboxing footage and create 3 short ad variations (15–16 seconds each) using different hooks from the footage provided. This is how we evaluate every candidate.



If you do not submit the form with the completed trial task, your application will not be reviewed.



We review submissions within 24 hours. If you're shortlisted, you'll get feedback and next steps immediately.

title: Web Dev & UX / Facebook media buyer & google tag manager / tracking specialist
description:
## Job Title: Web Dev & UX / Meta & Google Media Buyer / Tracking Specialist



### About the Role



We are looking for a versatile and detail-oriented professional who can bridge the gap between web development, user experience, and digital advertising. This role is perfect for someone who understands the technical side of domains, hosting, and tracking, while also having an eye for design and performance-driven media buying.



### Responsibilities



* **Web Development & UX**



  * Manage domain and subdomain adjustments, DNS records, and hosting setups

  * Ensure websites and landing pages are properly connected, functional, and optimised

  * Build and optimise high-converting landing pages with strong design and UX principles

  * Use Canva (and other tools) to create visually appealing assets that align with brand guidelines for meta ads



* **Digital Advertising**



  * Plan, launch, and manage effective Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

  * Support and manage Google Ads campaigns where needed

  * Optimise campaigns for lead generation, conversions, and ROI



* **Tracking & Analytics**



  * Implement and maintain Google Tag Manager setups

  * Configure accurate tracking for Google Analytics (GA4), Meta Pixel, and other platforms

  * Troubleshoot and resolve tracking issues to ensure reliable reporting



### Skills & Experience



* Strong understanding of domains, subdomains, hosting, and WordPress (or similar CMS)

* Proven ability to design and optimise landing pages that convert

* Canva design skills with an eye for clean, professional layouts

* Hands-on experience running Meta Ads campaigns (Google Ads a plus)

* Proficiency in Google Tag Manager and tracking integrations

* Ability to troubleshoot technical issues quickly and independently



### Nice to Have



* Familiarity with SEO fundamentals

* Experience in conversion rate optimisation (CRO)

* Copywriting skills for ad creatives and landing pages



### What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:



* Resourceful and proactive in solving problems

* Comfortable wearing multiple hats across technical, creative, and marketing work

* Focused on outcomes and performance, not just tasks

* Able to balance technical accuracy with creative flair

title: Technical Recruiter - US Employer Outreach
description:
**Title:** Technical Recruiter - Connect US Companies with International Talent (Remote, High Commission)



**Description:**



We are hiring commission-based recruiters to connect US tech companies with our pool of pre-vetted international professionals.



ABOUT O1DMATCH



O1dMatch is a job matching platform that connects US employers with international talent who qualify for O-1 visas. Employers browse talent profiles and send one-click interest letters. No visa sponsorship required — the talent handles their own visa using employer support letters.



This removes the biggest barrier to hiring international talent.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Reach out to US tech companies hiring for hard-to-fill roles

Introduce them to O1dMatch and our talent pool

Guide them through the one-click interest letter process

Earn high commission on every employer that signs up and engages



COMPENSATION



This is a commission-based role. You earn for every employer you bring to the platform who actively engages with talent. Top performers can earn significantly.



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Create a FREE account at 
 (use code BONUS100 for 3 months free access)



Step 2: Explore the platform thoroughly

Browse the talent profiles

See how interest letters work

Understand the employer experience



Step 3: Submit a short report (1-2 paragraphs) answering:

How would you explain this platform to a US hiring manager?

What types of companies would benefit most?

How would you approach outreach?



We will review your report. If you clearly understand the platform and have a solid approach, we will onboard you and discuss commission structure.



PLATFORM: 

ACCESS CODE: BONUS100

title: E-Commerce Customer Experience Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



E-Commerce Customer Experience Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1,300 per month



Job Overview: 

We are looking for an E-Commerce Customer Experience Specialist to join a growing e-commerce team and help deliver an exceptional experience for customers. In this role, you will support existing, potential, and new customers by responding to inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring smooth order and fulfillment processes. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment. This role also involves collaborating with internal teams and assisting with operational tasks related to order management and logistics.



Key Responsibilities:



* Customer Service Support

Communicate daily with customers and potential customers through written channels such as
, chat, and customer support platforms.

Troubleshoot and resolve customer issues efficiently to ensure a positive customer experience.

Track, analyze, and manage customer-related issues within internal systems (e.g., shipping carrier issues, fulfillment delays, order inquiries).

Monitor customer orders and provide updates regarding order status, shipping, and delivery.

Assist in developing and improving customer service protocols and processes.

Identify opportunities to improve workflows and customer experience.



* Operations Support

Assist the operations team with tasks such as order auditing, order management, and logistics coordination.

Review and verify order details to ensure accuracy and proper fulfillment.

Support the team in tracking fulfillment timelines and resolving operational issues when necessary.

Learn and utilize internal operational systems to support daily business operations.

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure orders are processed accurately and delivered on time.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Previous experience as a Customer Service Representative, Customer Support Specialist, or in a related role.

Strong written communication skills with the ability to clearly respond to customer inquiries and concerns.

Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot issues and identify practical solutions.

Ability to clearly articulate complex issues and solutions to both customers and internal teams.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

Positive attitude with the ability to learn quickly and adapt to new systems and processes.

Proactive, flexible, and comfortable switching between tasks in a fast-paced work environment.

Experience working in e-commerce or fast-growing businesses is a plus.

Interest in health, nutrition, wellness, or consumer product brands is preferred.



Experience with the following tools is a plus:

Shopify Plus

Gorgias or other Customer Experience (CX) platforms

Okendo

BazaarVoice

Amazon Seller Central

Walmart Marketplace

Warehouse Management Systems (WMS)

Google Workspace





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Setup Specialist (Fresh Graduates only, Permanent WFH)
description:
Job Title: Setup Specialist (Applicants must hold a Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Business, Accounting, or a related field ONLY)



Job Description:



As an Initial Disclosure Specialist, you will play a critical role in the mortgage origination process. Your primary responsibility will be to ensure that all initial disclosure documents are accurate, compliant, and delivered to borrowers on time. This role requires attention to detail, strong communication skills, and knowledge of mortgage regulations.



Key Responsibilities:



Prepare and review initial disclosure documents for accuracy and compliance with federal and state regulations.

Ensure timely delivery of initial disclosures in accordance with regulatory timelines.

Coordinate with loan officers, processors, and other tea
mbers to gather necessary information for disclosure preparation.

Stay up to date with mortgage industry regulations and compliance requirements.

Identify and resolve discrepancies related to initial disclosures.

Assist in developing and improving policies and procedures for the disclosure process.

Maintain accurate records of all disclosure activities and documentation.



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field.

Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills.

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.



Benefits:



? Competitive salary and performance-based incentives

? Paid time off and holidays (once regularized)

? Opportunities for promotion and career advancement

? Paid training and potential for pay raises

? Work-from-home setup



Job Type: Full-time



Pay: From Php19,715.33 per month



Plus, enjoy a performance-based salary increase of ?25,000 after 5 months!



Schedule:



8-hour shift

Monday to Friday

Night shift / Rotational shift

May include weekends and holidays

Equal Opportunity Employer:





Minimum Technical Requirements (IMPORTANT)



Applicants must meet the following minimum requirements:



1. Computer Requirements



At least 8GB RAM

Intel Core i5 4th Generation or newer (or equivalent AMD processor)

Reliable computer capable of handling mortgage systems and multiple documents



2. Internet Requirements



Stable internet connection

Minimum 50 Mbps download speed



Applicants must run a speed test at:







Please take a screenshot of your Speedtest result.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



1. All applicants are required to
 their application to BOTH
 addresses below:




 




 



2. Use this exact subject line format:



STAR | Full Name 



Example:



STAR | Juan Dela Cruz 



3. Your
 Must Include ALL of the Following



a. Resume link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OnlineJobs link)

Resume must be set to “Anyone with the link can view”

RAM

title: Content Creator - Video Editor for YT Videos
description: My name is Doc William and I live in Honolulu, Hawai'i. Have recently started a YouTube channel in the "Business" niche. The name of the YT channel is "Business Execution Central." I am wanting high quality, professional 8:30 - 10:00 minute videos....and accompanying thumbnail....designed and created for this new YT channel. I will provide all the scripts….and you take it from there with your professional creativity and complete each video and send it to me for review….you would also create the thumbnail as well. You would be responsible for video creation, voiceover and revisions, if needed. I will have a Dropbox folder set up for you to upload all your work....so my team can carefully review in case there are any revisions required....which I hope would be at a minimum, please. All produced work needs to be at the highest possible professional level. No shortcuts. Nothing goofy on any level. Our YT audience will be brilliant professionals who are seeking advice and insight from a trusted source. That is us! We already have 20+ videos on our channel....and I can send you the link to our YT channel so you can see what we are doing. Some of the vids are ok....some better....and then there are some that are really strong....so those would be the standard we're aiming for.....and continue to get even better moving forward. Right now I have 5 video editors....but would be interested in hiring a few more part time. But....I need you to be very, very solid with your talent and skill. I'm definitely not looking for beginners who need lots of hand-holding or managing.....I need people who know their stuff....and can deliver at the highest level....immediately. It would be my honor to have you on our "Business Execution Central" Team. I look forward to hearing from you as soon as possible. You could be making money beginning today....as long as you can perform as a video editor professional with impressive creative and genius ability. Perhaps we start with a paid trial video? Mahalo nui loa....from Hawai'i.....

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant – Appointment Setting & Marketing Support
description:
Armadas Exterior LLC is seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant to support our inbound call handling, appointment scheduling, and marketing activities. We are an exterior remodeling company providing roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and solar services. The primary goal of this role is to ensure incoming leads are handled quickly and converted into scheduled appointments while also supporting ongoing marketing and outreach efforts.



Working Hours



Business operates on Pacific Standard Time (PST)



Phone coverage needed between 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST



Full-time position



Preferred schedule: Monday through Saturday



Some flexibility may be possible since we have in-office staff until 3:00 PM PST



Primary Responsibilities



Inbound Call Handling & Appointment Setting



Answer incoming calls forwarded from our business phone lines



Professionally communicate with potential customers



Schedule appointments for our sales team across two metro service locations



Accurately capture customer information and service requests



Lead Generation & Outreach



Assist with lead scraping and research to identify potential prospects



Support cold outreach or follow-up communication when necessary



Help generate additional appointment opportunities for the sales team



Marketing Support



Assist with social media posting



Track performance and return on investment (ROI) for marketing campaigns



Assist with
 marketing campaigns using a customer contact list of 4,000+ existing customers



Required Skills & Qualifications



Extremely fluent English (written and spoken)



Strong communication skills, particularly over the phone



Experience with appointment setting or call handling



Experience with lead scraping, prospecting, or list building



Familiarity with
 marketing and social media management



Strong organizational skills and attention to detail



Ability to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours



Preferred Experience



Previous experience working as a virtual assistant



Experience in lead generation, cold outreach, or sales support



Familiarity with CRM systems or marketing tools



About Our Company

Armadas Exterior LLC is a growing exterior remodeling company based in Oregon. Our services include roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors, and solar solutions. The virtual assistant will play an important role in helping us manage incoming leads, maintain consistent marketing efforts, and generate new appointments.

title: Video Editor (In House)
description:
Hello!

I run a Real Estate Media company in the United States. We are looking to bring our video editing in-house and add someone to our team.

There are many large editing companies, but they have big teams and different editors working on each project. Because of this, the quality and style can change every time. We want to work with one editor who can become part of our team and help us create a consistent style across all of our videos.

We specialize in high-end real estate video and are known as one of the highest quality media creators in our area. We are looking for someone who enjoys being creative, follows new trends in real estate video, and is comfortable giving suggestions. We also appreciate feedback about how we can improve on the filming side.

We see this as a team relationship, and we want the editor to feel like an important part of our crew.

Good communication is very important, so the ideal candidate should be comfortable communicating in English.



Editing Software:

Final Cut Pro is preferred, but not required.

DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere are also perfectly fine.

We also create talking-head style ads for real estate agents.

We are looking for someone familiar with:

Current real estate video editing trends

Color grading LOG footage (currently C-Log3)

Creative transitions and masking transitions

Higgsfield AI (mainly for AI virtual staging and day-to-night effects — not heavy VFX)

Basic sound design

Premium captions and masking

We are hoping to bring someone on soon, as our busy season is coming up.



Test Edit:

A test edit is required as part of the application.

Below is a link to the RAW footage from a recent shoot.

Please create a 30–45 second edit to show your style and creativity. You do not need to create a full video.

We want to see:

Your color grading

Your music choice

Your sound design

Your creativity with transitions and shots

Have fun with it!

Please
 a link to your completed test edit when submitting your application.



Video Instructions:



Property Address:

123 Main Street

Scranton, PA 18434



Editing style:

Cinematic look and feel

Color grading is very important

Deeper shadows are okay if it creates a moody cinematic look



Please include:

At least one day-to-night transition

At least one door opening transition

Use as many or as few clips as you want from the link below. The goal is simply to show your creativity and editing style.



RAW footage Link:

title: Experienced Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are a Transaction Coordinator Team in the Bay Area, CA. We are looking to add an additional EXPERIENCED Transaction Coordinator who's attention to detail and customer service are second to none! Our ideal candidate would thrive in a structured environment, have rapid problem solving ability and be highly responsive.



To be considered for the position, please make sure to send your resume and intro video or recording. Also, please note. You MUST HAVE RECENT TC EXPERIENCE PREFERABLY IN CALIFORNIA TO BE CONSIDERED. RATE TBD DEPENDING ON EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ANY TC EXPERIENCE. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE WORKING FOR MULTIPLE CLIENTS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO IS GOING TO BE PART OF OUR TEAM AND GROW WITH OUR TEAM. REFERENCES  WILL BE REQUIRED AND VERIFIED.



Primary Objectives:



Keep Agents and the team protected through compliance and document accuracy with a high level of detail.



Respond to all incoming client communications the same day within business hours



Audit all transaction files within required timelines with 100% touches up to date



Must have experience using KW Command, Skyslope, and other known RE Platforms. Must have experience using Glide, Open to close and MLS listings.



Manage the transaction process from contract to close.



Develop effective ways for better communication and increased customer satisfaction



Conflict resolution - think independently and be proactive. Get coaching from tea
mbers when stuck and do not give your agents the job back



Have RECENT Transaction Coordinator experience working with CA Agents, preferably in Norther California. Able to read and understand a CA Purchase Agreement.



Regular Work Activities



Managing all incoming calls & communications pertaining to transactions



CAR contract processing in Brokerage processing system, create timeline & document it in teams systems and perform signature audit



Communicate with clients, Agents, Lenders and Escrow throughout transaction regarding updates, timeline, initial deposit, signing and other account needs



Add fully executed Residential Purchase Contract to the brokerages system



Daily audit of files - reporting what was done





o Managing all pending contract files and ensuring proper touches/connection through file audit process. All files kept up to date and maintained with the highest level of customer service, communication, and expectations across all channels of the transaction. Co-op and agent spoken to twice a week, lender twice a week, title twice a week



Order Home Warranty, send Invoice to Escrow



Submit DA requests/Broker Demands. Verify with Agent(s) DA’s are correct prior to Close of Escrow submit to Escrow for disbursement.



The position will start part time for training purposes but will convert into full time.

We offer Holiday pay (10 days) after 90 day probationary period.

PTO after one year of Employment.

title: Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Admin / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Location: Remote

Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



About This Role

We are a U.S.-based promotional products company with a structured, rule-based workflow.

Our daily operations involve handling
s, managing quotes, tracking orders, and maintaining clean systems.

This role is not creative and not a growth/leadership role. It is an execution role that requires accuracy, consistency, and strict rule-following.

If you enjoy working with clear SOPs, checklists, and structured processes, this role will be a great fit.

If you prefer flexibility, improvisation, or constantly changing rules, this role is not suitable.



Core Responsibilities (High-Level)

• Manage and organize daily operational tasks following established SOPs

• Review and prioritize
s from suppliers and clients

• Support quote and order processes with accurate data entry and tracking

• Prepare quotes by reviewing supplier pricing and calculating margins accurately

• Maintain clean, well-organized files and records

• Prepare clear, professional English drafts for internal and client communication

• Follow instructions precisely and ask clarification questions when needed

• Provide daily work summaries and status updates

(Detailed step-by-step training and SOPs are provided after onboarding.)



What We Value (Non-Negotiable)

1) Extreme Attention to Detail

• You naturally double-check your work before submitting

• Small inconsistencies immediately catch your attention

• You notice differences in product details, quantities, colors, and specifications

• Accuracy matters more to you than speed

This is important for promotional products where details such as product color, imprint color, quantity, and shipping timelines must be correct.



2) Strong Number Awareness

• You are comfortable working with numbers and spreadsheets

• You can quickly understand pricing, margins, and calculations

• You naturally double-check numbers before sending information

• You are confident using Excel or Google Sheets for calculations and tracking



3) Strong Rule-Following Ability

• You prefer clear instructions and SOPs

• You do not “improvise” when rules exist

• You are comfortable repeating structured tasks daily



4) Excellent Written English

• You can clearly rewrite supplier messages into professional client-facing English

• You understand tone, clarity, and business context



5) Fast Learner Within Structure

• You can learn SOPs quickly

• You apply instructions consistently once trained



6) Independent Problem Solver

• You actively try to understand systems instead of waiting for instructions

• When encountering a new situation, you attempt to analyze it before asking questions

• You are comfortable learning tools and processes on your own

• You look for solutions instead of waiting to be told every step



7) Reliability & Stability

• You are seeking a long-term, stable role

• You are comfortable with repetitive, structured work



What This Role Is NOT

• Not a creative or strategy role

• Not a sales or leadership role

• Not a flexible-hours or part-time role

This is a professional execution role within a defined system.



What You Do NOT Need

• Promotional products industry experience

• Advanced technical skills

All systems and workflows are trained internally.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Only candidates who follow instructions exactly will be considered.

To confirm attention to detail, include the word “Precision” in the first line of your application.



Step 1 – Written Application

Please answer all of the following:

1. Introduce yourself in 5–7 sentences

2. Describe a role where accuracy and rule-following were critical

3. Rate your written English ability (1–10)

4. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time, Monday–Friday

5. How comfortable are you working with numbers and spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets)? Please provide an example.



Step 2 – English Voice or Video (1–2 minutes)

Please record a short English voice or video introduction including:

• Your name and background

• Why you consider yourself detail-oriented

• Why you are looking for a long-term, stable role



Step 3 – Required Subject Line

Subject:

VA – Detail-Oriented

Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

title: Account Manager
description:
I’m looking for an Account Manager to help manage and support employee benefit accounts on a day-to-day basis.



In this role, you’ll handle client communication, account updates, renewals, reporting, and issue resolution. You’ll work closely with a Senior Executive Account Manager and support health insurance and employee benefit administration. Experience with Employee Navigator is a big plus, as we’re transitioning our enrollment platform.



What you’ll do:



Manage daily servicing of health insurance and employee benefit accounts

Process enrollments, terminations, changes, renewals, and ID cards

Set up and manage groups in Employee Navigator

Prepare and track benefit applications and insurance documents

Assist with renewals, quotes, reports, and administrative tasks

Support clients with claims, billing, and carrier-related issues

Communicate with clients, carriers, and internal teams via
 and phone



What I’m looking for:



At least 2 years of experience in the health insurance industry

Strong customer service and client-facing experience

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook

Experience with Employee Navigator (preferred, not required)

Detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working with numbers

Strong communication skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment



Schedule:



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Monday-Friday, 9AM-5PM Pacific Standard Time



Apply here:

title: Digital Marketing Lead
description:
Role Overview



Own the end-to-end marketing campaigns engine—strategy, creative requests, execution, measurement, and iteration—to generate quality discovery calls for Sales. You’ll lead a two-person pod, coordinate with the Design team for social/video/reels/landing assets, and ensure rigorous attribution and reporting via in-house platform.



What You’ll Do

Strategy & Planning



Design and manage multi-channel campaigns (LinkedIn outreach + ads,
 funnels & nurture, landing pages, partnerships)

Define ICPs, offers, messaging maps, and experiment/test hypotheses

Execution & Systems



Launch and oversee LinkedIn sequences and GoHighLevel automations

Maintain organized UTMs, campaign taxonomy & tracking

Ensure seamless lead handoff into our in-house app / CRM

Creative Collaboration



Lead creative briefs and SLAs with Design (social posts, reels, carousels, landing page blocks)

Review assets to ensure message-market fit, brand consistency, and compliance

Uphold our brand pillars, style, and voice

Proposals & Reporting



Create campaign proposals (goals, audience, offers, creative brief, budget)

Produce regular performance reports with insights and next-step recommendations

Optimization & Learning



Run A/B tests (hooks, offers, landing pages, sequences)

Capture learnings and build playbooks for continuous improvement

Cross-Team Collaboration



Work closely with Operations, Sales, and Client Success to ensure clean handoffs, data integrity, and feedback loops

Be a communicator of wins, challenges, and insights

Key Outcomes

A steady cadence of qualified discovery calls (SQLs) delivered to Sales.

Efficient CPSQL, healthy reply rates (LinkedIn/email), strong landing-page conversion, and clean campaign attribution.

Clear proposals before launch and clear reports after launch.



Qualifications

2+ years in B2B / SaaS / performance marketing roles

Direct experience managing LinkedIn outreach,
 funnels, landing pages, automation (GoHighLevel or similar)

Proven track record in multi-channel campaigns & attribution

Strong skills in brief-writing, creative review, and campaign processes

Analytical mindset + comfort with data, dashboards, UTM tracking

Excellent communication skills (English + Filipino)

Ability to collaborate across teams & fast-paced environment

Nice to Have

Fintech/payments or SaaS experience; familiarity with compliance-sensitive marketing.

Landing-page experimentation and funnel analytics depth.

What We Offer

Fully Work-from-Home Setup



Health & Security (HMO Coverage)



Work-Life Balance & Leave Privileges



Additional Benefits:



Saturday & Sunday Off: Reserved for rest and personal pursuits

PTO Conversion to Cash: Flexibility for when you need it most

13th Month Pay: way of expressing gratitude for your hard work on holiday season

title: Marketing Lead
description:
At Yokly, we’re looking for a Marketing Lead who doesn’t just run campaigns — but owns the entire growth engine end to end. This role is for a strategic, data-driven marketer who knows how to turn positioning, funnels, and creative into qualified discovery calls for Sales.



You’ll lead a focused pod, collaborate closely with Design, Sales, and Operations, and run multi-channel campaigns with clear attribution, measurable results, and continuous optimization. If you love building systems, testing ideas, and seeing your work directly influence revenue — this role is built for you.



What You’ll Do

Strategy & Planning

Design and manage multi-channel campaigns: LinkedIn outreach + ads,
 funnels & nurture, landing pages, and partnership campaigns.

Define ICPs, offers, messaging maps, and test hypotheses that shape our go-to-market strategy.



Execution & Systems

Launch and oversee LinkedIn sequences and GoHighLevel automations.

Maintain organized UTMs, campaign taxonomy, and tracking to ensure clean attribution.

Ensure seamless lead handoff into our in-house app/CRM — every lead counts.



Creative Collaboration

Lead creative briefs and SLAs with the Design team (social posts, reels, carousels, landing page blocks).

Review assets to ensure message-market fit, brand consistency, and compliance.

Uphold our brand pillars, style, and voice across all campaigns.



Proposals & Reporting

Build campaign proposals outlining goals, audience, offers, creative briefs, and budgets.

Produce clear performance reports with actionable insights and recommendations for continuous improvement.



Optimization & Learning

Run A/B tests across hooks, offers, landing pages, and sequences.

Capture learnings and build playbooks to elevate future campaigns.



Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with Operations, Sales, and Client Success for smooth handoffs, data integrity, and feedback loops.

Be a communicator of wins, challenges, and insights across the team.





???? Who We’re Looking For (Qualifications)

Master’s degree in Marketing, Business Management, or related field.

3+ years in B2B / SaaS / performance marketing roles.

Hands-on experience with LinkedIn outreach,
 funnels, landing pages, and automation (GoHighLevel or similar).

Proven track record running multi-channel campaigns with strong attribution.

Strong skills in brief-writing, creative review, and campaign processes.

Analytical mindset; comfortable working with dashboards, UTMs, and performance data.

Excellent English communication skills.

Collaborative spirit; thrives in fast-paced environments.



Nice to Have

Experience in Fintech, Payments, or SaaS

Deep understanding of funnel optimization and landing-page experimentation

Familiarity with compliance-sensitive marketing



What You Get

Fully remote, full-time role

Weekends off (Saturday & Sunday)

HMO upon regularization

PTO, Sick Leave, Mental Health Leave

PTO conversion to cash

13th Month Pay as our holiday thank-you

mber

title: Real Estate Accounting Team Lead
description:
**Please read the entire job description & how to apply until the end!**

 

About KPI Advisors

KPI Advisors is a U.S.-based accounting and fractional CFO firm that works exclusively with real estate investors — flippers, landlords, wholesalers, and short-term rental operators. 

 

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced accountant who has worked directly with U.S. real estate investors. This is a senior role with client-facing and team leadership responsibilities. You will manage bookkeeping for a portfolio of real estate investor clients, review work from junior bookkeepers, and communicate directly with clients.

 

Requirements

Education & Credentials

- Graduate of BS Accountancy

- CPA license preferred but not required

- QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor certification required



Real Estate Experience — Required

- At least 1 year of bookkeeping or accounting experience working with U.S.-based real estate investors

- Must have experience with at least two of the following: fix-and-flip, buy-and-hold rentals, short-term rentals, wholesaling.

- Must understand flip job costing, rehab cost tracking, rental property schedules, CapEx vs. repair classification, 1099 filing for contractors, and loan refinance.



General Accounting Experience

- Minimum 5 years of U.S.-based bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Proficient in bank reconciliations, accounts payable/receivable, month-end close, and financial reporting

- Experience with catch-up and clean-up bookkeeping engagements

- Payroll experience a plus (Gusto or ADP)



Leadership & Communication

- 2+ years of team leadership or mentoring experience in a bookkeeping or accounting setting

- Strong English communication skills — written and spoken

- Comfortable communicating directly with U.S. clients with video on

 

Software & Tools

- QuickBooks Online (QBO)

- ClickUp & Notion

- Double Keeper or Xenett (practice management software)

- AppFolio, 
, Gusto, or ADP

 

What You'll Do

- Manage bookkeeping for a portfolio of real estate investor clients

- Perform and review bank reconciliations, month-end closes, and financial reports

- Handle or supervise catch-up and clean-up engagements

- Assist with 1099 filings, payroll entries, and vendor management

- Review and quality-check work from junior bookkeepers

- Maintain client workflows in ClickUp and document processes in Notion

- Communicate directly with clients to gather documents and explain financials

 

What We Offer

- Fully remote, work-from-home position

- 13th mo equivalent bonus & annual performance salary increase

- Competitive compensation based on experience

- Clear growth path to Director or Department Head

- Stable, long-term engagement with a growing firm

- Ongoing training in real estate accounting and AI tools

 

How to Apply (use 8 AP or more)

Please send your application with the following:

1. Updated resume or CV

2. New loom video describing your real estate accounting experience — what types of investors you worked with and what you handled (old video is not accepted)

3. DISC test screenshot

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller For Long Term High Commission Role
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center. We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this

-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert + Content Production Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled GoHighLevel expert who can also support content production for our fast-growing marketing operations. This role is perfect for someone who understands funnels, automation, and workflows — and can help execute high-quality content and marketing assets.

Responsibilities

GoHighLevel (GHL) Tasks

Build and optimize funnels, landing pages, and automation workflows

Set up pipelines, calendars, triggers, forms, and integrations

Manage CRM, tagging, segmentation, and lead nurturing sequences

Troubleshoot technical issues and ensure smooth system performance

Support onboarding setups inside GHL for new clients or campaigns

Content Production Tasks

Assist in creating marketing assets (graphics, video snippets, social media content)

Organize content in GHL or related tools

Prepare simple visuals or layouts for campaigns (we provide templates & guidance)

Basic editing for short-form content is a plus

Maintain organized asset libraries and versioning

How We Want You to Manage the Process & Flow

We need someone who can take ownership of the workflow and keep operations running smoothly:

1. Follow and Improve SOPs

Execute tasks based on clear step-by-step processes

Suggest improvements when needed

Keep everything organized in GHL, Google Drive, trackers, etc.

2. Maintain a Smooth Production Pipeline

Manage tasks in order: planning ? creation ? approval ? publishing

Update statuses clearly and consistently

Coordinate with the team for missing materials or approvals

3. Be Proactive, Not Reactive

Anticipate next steps in funnels and campaigns

Raise issues early

Stay ahead of deadlines

4. Communicate Clearly

Provide daily/weekly updates

Ask clarifying questions early

Use clean naming conventions and file organization

5. Quality Control

Double-check work before submitting

Ensure funnels, automations, and content look polished

Avoid errors, broken flows, or missed triggers

6. Manage Multiple Tasks With Structure

Prioritize tasks properly

Break down big tasks into smaller steps

Keep the workflow moving even during busy weeks

title: Technical Support Representative (with E-Commerce VA experience)
description:
About the Company

We are on a mission to help people reconnect with themselves, simplify their lives, and take meaningful breaks from technology. We create thoughtfully designed products—including consumer electronic devices—that seamlessly integrate into a mindful lifestyle. As we continue to grow, we're looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Customer Experience Associate with a background in technical troubleshooting to help manage day-to-day support and improve our systems.



What You’ll Do

Technical Support & Troubleshooting

Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to consumer electronic hardware.

Guide customers through technical steps to troubleshoot device performance or connectivity.

Handle returns, exchanges, refunds, and warranty requests with care and efficiency.

Identify technical patterns in customer feedback and proactively communicate opportunities to improve the product, packaging, or processes.



Customer Experience & Operations

Manage the support inbox and provide timely, professional, and warm responses to customers.

Maintain and manage Shopify to process orders, update customer information, and troubleshoot order issues.

Ensure all communication reflects a calm, mindful, and premium brand voice.

Track weekly support metrics including ticket volume, response time, and resolution time.

Provide a short weekly summary outlining trends, recurring customer questions, and notable issues.



CX Systems & Process Improvement

Suggest improvements to macros, FAQs, and helpdesk workflows based on recurring technical themes.

Maintain organized documentation of support processes and updates.

Assist in refining workflows to improve response times and overall customer satisfaction.



You’ll Be a Great Fit If:

Technical Experience: You have 2–5 years of experience in customer support, with a specific focus on technical support or troubleshooting for consumer electronics or hardware.

VA Background: You have at least 1 year of experience as a Virtual Assistant (VA) working directly with brands or small teams (please note: we are not looking for BPO experience for this specific role).

Platform Proficiency: You are very proficient and experienced with Shopify, Gorgias, and Google Workspace.

Empathetic Communication: You have excellent written and verbal communication skills; you can be warm, clear, and precise even when customers are frustrated.

Problem Solver: You enjoy diagnosing what's really going on, getting to the root cause, and thinking systematically about how to reduce support load over time.

Organized & Independent: You are extremely organized and can handle volume without letting things slip while working effectively in a remote environment.



Why This Role?

Flexible, fully remote position.

Part-time availability starting at 20 hours per week.

Direct collaboration with a tight-knit, mission-driven team.

Opportunity to help shape and build the customer experience and technical support functions.

description:

Schedule: Full-Time
