About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Medical Assistant to support a growing mental health practice. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, tech-savvy, confident in patient communication, and experienced in both front-end and back-end medical administration. This role requires the ability to work independently once trained, while also collaborating effectively as part of a clinical team. The environment is extremely fast paced and involves many intricacies. The VA must be able to multitask, possess the ability to use critical thinking skills, and work collaboratively with another VA. Our clients are generally children and adolescents.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage patient intake, scheduling, and ongoing appointment coordination

• Communicate confidently and professionally with patients and families via phone, fax, and secure messaging

• Assist with medical charting and documentation within the EHR

• Process patient referrals and coordinate follow-up care

• Handle prior authorizations (Cover
ds) and medication refill requests

• Perform comprehensive front-office and back-office administrative tasks

• Knowledge with insurance billing and eligibility checks

• Support clinicians with day-to-day operational and clinical workflow needs

• Maintain strict compliance with HIPAA and patient confidentiality standards



Required Qualifications

• Full-time availability for a virtual medical assistant role

• Prior experience in mental health care (child and adolescent experience strongly preferred)

• HIPAA certified

• Hands-on experience with SimplePractice Electronic Health Record (EHR) software

• Experience using Spruce phone and fax software

• Expert-level proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Drive)

• Ability to work independently once trained, while remaining a strong team player

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High level of professionalism, reliability, and trustworthiness



Technical & Security Requirements

• Secure, reliable computer with VPN protection

• Stable high-speed internet connection

• Ability to work efficiently in a fully remote environment



Preferred Attributes

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Proactive problem-solver with attention to detail

• Comfortable handling sensitive patient information with discretion and care



What We Offer

• Fully remote, full-time position (40 hours per week)

• Supportive employer with consistent 5-star Google Reviews 

• Supportive and collaborative team environment

• Opportunity to work in a meaningful mental health setting making a real impact

• Annual Christmas bonus

• Salary evaluation at 3, 6, 9, and 12 months

title: Junior Social Media Marketer (Food & Hospitality Brands)
description:
Remote | Full Time | Join a Creative All-Female Team



Are you a creative social media marketer who loves food, trends, and creating engaging content?



Do you enjoy making Instagram Reels, designing eye-catching Canva graphics, and bringing brands to life online?



If yes — this could be the perfect role for you.



We’re looking for a Junior Social Media Marketer / Marketing Assistant to join our high-performing and fun all-female team. This is an exciting opportunity to work with some of Australia’s most exciting restaurants, cafes, and hospitality brands.



If you’re creative, organised, and passionate about social media, this is your chance to shine.



About Us



We are CPM Online Marketing, an Australian social media marketing agency based in Sydney.



For over 12 years, we’ve helped 250+ hospitality businesses grow their brands, attract more customers, and stand out online.



We work with restaurants, cafes, bars, and hotels across Sydney, Melbourne, and all over Australia, creating content that makes people “eat with their eyes.”



Our agency is owned by a passionate husband-and-wife team, and we’ve built a tight-knit creative team in Australia and the Philippines that genuinely enjoys working together.



We’re a fun, supportive, and collaborative team that values creativity, trust, and great work.



Learn more about us:



Website





Instagram


/cpmonlinemarketing



Why You’ll Love Working With Us:

? Work with exciting food & hospitality brands

? Be part of a supportive, all-female creative team

? Work remotely with an Australian agency

? Use your creativity every day

? Opportunity to grow your social media marketing career



The Role



We’re looking for a creative and organised Social Media Marketer with at least 2 years of experience who understands social media platforms and knows how to make content look engaging, polished, and scroll-stopping.



You’ll help manage social media accounts for multiple hospitality brands while working closely with our marketing team.



Your Responsibilities



Essential Responsibilities:

• Manage social media accounts and schedule posts

• Write engaging captions (using our templates + ChatGPT support)

• Create eye-catching graphics using Canva

• Edit short-form video content for Instagram Reels

• Help maintain brand consistency across social media platforms

• Work within our team workflow to ensure content is delivered on time



Skills & Experience Required:

? Minimum 2 years social media marketing experience

? Experience managing Instagram &
 accounts

? Strong Canva design skills

? Basic video editing for short-form content (CapCut or similar)

? Excellent written and spoken English

? Ability to work independently and stay organised remotely

? Experience using ChatGPT for caption writing or content creation



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):

• Experience running Meta Ads

• Familiarity with Meta Business Manager / Ads Manager

• Experience using Asana or other project management tools

•
 marketing experience (Mailchimp or similar)

• Experience working in a marketing agency

• Ability to generate social media performance reports



Soft Skills We Value

We’re looking for someone who is:



? Positive and friendly

? A team player

? Honest and reliable

? Detail-oriented

? Proactive and organised

? Mature and professional



Application Requirements



To apply, please submit:



• Your creative portfolio (social posts, graphics, reels, etc.)

• Examples of campaigns or accounts you have worked on



We want to see your creativity and style.



Apply here:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdJK7ZOyA5r02jx7ch75HF1z-DEPxzGVkTeeck30pOFmFV9Ww/viewform

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
Job Title: Operations & Administrative Assistant



Company Overview

Archadeck Outdoor Living is North America's leading designer and builder of outdoor living spaces, such as decks, porches, and hardscape patios. We are a results-driven company looking for a professional to assist the Business Owner in day-to-day operations.



The Role

We are moving away from an answering service to bring our customer touchpoints in-house. You will be the primary voice of our office and the engine behind our project management. You will be responsible for managing JobTread (our CRM), handling live client calls, preparing permit applications, and managing invoices.



Key Responsibilities

• Live Communication: Answer incoming calls to ensure client inquiries receive immediate service.

• CRM Management: Maintain client data, crew assignments, and project timelines within our JobTread platform.

• Permit Coordination: Prepare and compile permit application packages for local building officials to ensure projects stay on schedule.

• Financial & Job Costing: Manage invoices and vendor information to ensure accurate job costing; follow up on client/vendor payment issues.

• Project Administration: Manage tasks and reminders for projects and maintain organized digital client folders.

• Ability to work within US EST business hours



Trait and Skill Requirements

• Experience: At least 2 years of experience in high-performance administrative support roles. Experience in construction or real estate industries preferred.

• Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer service orientation.

• Technical Savvy: Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, and web-based CRMs.

• Organization: Ability to manage multiple priorities, meet strict deadlines, and maintain high attention to detail.

• Writing & Math: Strong reading, writing, and arithmetic skills for composing materials and managing budgets.

• Integrity: Must demonstrate high integrity and a professional, positive attitude.

title: GoHighLevel / CRM / Automation Operator
description:
About This Role



I’m looking for someone who builds systems and executes ideas.



Not just someone who follows instructions.



Someone who understands CRM systems, marketing funnels, automation, and
 campaigns and can actually implement them without constant supervision.



You will be helping organize and build the marketing infrastructure behind several projects, including:



- CRM pipelines



- lead funnels



-
 automation



- calendar systems



- social media workflows



- marketing campaigns



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys turning ideas into working systems.



Your Core Responsibilities



You will help build and manage:



GoHighLevel CRM



- Funnel building and optimization



- Automation workflows



- Pipeline setup and management



- Calendar synchronization



- Lead capture systems



 Marketing



- Campaign setup



- Automation sequences



- Deliverability checks



- Lead segmentation



Marketing Funnels



- Landing pages



- lead magnets



- conversion flow setup



Social Media



- LinkedIn and Instagram management



- Scheduling content



- Organizing marketing assets



Content & Ads



- Basic video editing



- Preparing creatives for ads



- Uploading and organizing campaign material



Skills Required



You should already have hands-on experience with:



- GoHighLevel CRM



- Funnel building



-
 automation systems



- CRM pipelines



- Calendar integrations



- Social media scheduling



- Basic video editing



You must also have:



- reliable high-speed internet



- good written and spoken English



- strong organization skills



- the ability to solve problems independently



The Kind of Person I Want to Work With



You are:



- a builder



- a problem solver



- someone who finishes what they start



- organized and reliable



- comfortable learning new systems



- not afraid to say: “I’m not sure yet, but I’ll figure it out.”



You think in systems, not just tasks.



Over time, you may become my go-to operator, someone I trust to execute ideas and build infrastructure.



Work Structure



- Part-time (~4 hours per day)



- Flexible schedule



- Long-term opportunity for the right person



Important: Read carefully



Most people on job platforms use AI to write their applications.



I do not want that.



I want to see how you actually think.



So please follow these instructions exactly.



When you apply:



1. Start your message with the word SYSTEMS so I know you read the entire post.



2. Tell me about one automation or funnel you personally built and what it did.



3. Tell me one thing you dislike about GoHighLevel.



4. Include your LinkedIn profile.



5. Share any example of funnels, CRM systems, or automations you have built.



Important Rule



Do NOT use ChatGPT or any AI tools to write your reply.



I am not looking for perfect grammar.



I want real answers, real personality, and real experience.



If your message looks like a polished AI response, I will skip it.



If you enjoy building systems, executing ideas, and making things work, this role could grow into something much bigger.



Looking forward to seeing who the real operators are.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher: 



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Client Coach (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: VIDEO EDITOR FOR AI & TECH YOUTUBE CHANNEL. FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM POSITION
description:
VIDEO EDITOR FOR AI & TECH YOUTUBE CHANNEL. FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM POSITION



We're a growing YouTube channel covering AI, automation, robotics, and emerging technology. We're hiring 2 dedicated video editors for full-time, long-term positions.



This is not a side gig or one-off freelance project. We're building something real, and we're looking for editors who want to grow with the channel long-term. If you're early in your career, hungry to build a serious portfolio, and ready to commit to consistent, high-volume work, this is your opportunity to get in on the ground floor of a channel that's scaling fast. The editors who prove themselves here will have a clear path to expanded roles, higher pay, and real ownership over production.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Editing 3 long-form YouTube videos per week (9 to 22 minutes each) plus 1 vertical short (30 to 35 seconds). That's 4 deliverables per week. Each long-form video follows a detailed Editor's Table, a scene-by-scene visual blueprint that tells you exactly what goes on screen at every timecode. Every shot type, every B-roll asset, every visual composition, every documentation link is mapped out for you. You'll never have to guess what the vision is. Your job is to execute it at a high level with creative energy, polished visuals, and dynamic pacing.



Each video requires a visual change every 5 seconds. Zooms, cuts, motion graphics, text animations, transitions, split-screen compositions, kinetic text 
nts, and data overlays. This is fast-paced, high-retention editing designed to keep viewers locked in.



The vertical short is pulled from the best clip across your 3 long-form videos. After probation, this increases to 1 short per video (3 vertical shorts per week).





BREAKING NEWS PRIORITY



We also cover breaking AI news. When a major story drops, you may need to reprioritize your current workload and turn around a breaking news video as fast as possible. This means pausing whatever you're working on and editing the urgent video first. Speed and flexibility matter here. If you can't handle shifting priorities on short notice, this role isn't for you.





WHAT'S PROVIDED VS. WHAT YOU BUILD



Provided by us:



All A-roll footage (AI avatar talking head). You do NOT film or source A-roll.



An Editor's Handbook, your permanent reference guide covering every production standard, shot type definition, B-roll category, branded glitch placement, hook rules, avatar cleanup pipeline, and quality benchmarks. This is your go-to document for how things work on this channel. You'll receive it on day one.



A detailed Editor's Table for every video. A scene-by-scene visual blueprint with exact timecodes, shot types, visual assignments, B-roll tags, Director's Notes, and full spoken dialogue for every scene. You'll never have to guess what the vision is.



Documentation links and screenshot instructions. You capture the screenshots.



Stock footage keywords. You pull the clips from Envato Elements (access included).



After Effects composition directives. You build the compositions from detailed descriptions specifying elements, layout, colors, and animation.



YouTube source video search terms. You source real footage clips using WayinVideo (wayin.ai), a tool that lets you search within YouTube videos to find specific 
nts.



Quote card text and sources. You design and place them.



Full-screen kinetic text lines. You create bold, impactful typography 
nts.



Digital Twin Intro clips. Pre-recorded footage for the channel's signature intro sequence that appears at the start of every video. You'll receive the raw clips and build the intro following the Editor's Table direction.



What you build:



You're not sourcing content or coming up with ideas. Everything is mapped out for you in the Editor's Table, and the Editor's Handbook is your permanent reference for standards. But you ARE building the visuals, compositions, and motion graphics that bring it to life. Your creative judgment matters. How you cut, how you pace, how you build visual energy between scenes is your craft. The Editor's Table is the blueprint. You bring it to life.





THE 40/60 SPLIT



About 40% of each video features the AI avatar on screen. The remaining 60% is full-screen B-roll: custom After Effects compositions, documentation screenshots, source video footage, stock footage, quote cards, and kinetic text. A visual change must happen every 5 seconds. No static frames.





AVATAR SHOT TYPES YOU'LL WORK WITH



You'll work with five shot types that rotate throughout every video:



Full Frame. Pure avatar, direct to camera. Maximum 5 to 6 seconds per clip. Used sparingly at scene endings for emotional payoff.



Split Panel. Avatar on one side (~40% of frame), data/documentation/visual on the other (~60%). This is the primary delivery mode. The panel content changes every 5 seconds.



With Overlay. Avatar visible but kinetic text, stat bars, or lower thirds appear on screen. The viewer's eye is drawn to the data. Maximum 2 per scene.



Zoom Punch. Quick 1 to 2 second tight crop cut on the avatar's face for punchlines and pivots. Target 6 to 8 per video minimum.



PIP Float. Small circular avatar cutout (~30 to 35% of frame) floating over full-screen source footage. Features an orbiting glow trail around the circle edge. Used when real YouTube footage plays underneath the avatar's voice. Target 5 to 7 per video. Can run longer than other shot types (8 to 15 seconds).





B-ROLL TYPES YOU'LL WORK WITH



Every visual in the Editor's Table is tagged with one of six categories:



B.R1, Documentation: Full-screen screenshot of a source page, article, report, or data dashboard. You open the provided link, screenshot the relevant section, and drop it in. This is proof, showing the viewer real evidence.



B.R2, Authority Quote: Quote card overlay attributed to a specific person. For recognizable public figures, include a photo alongside the quote. 0 to 3 per video.



B.R3, AE Composition: Custom After Effects motion graphics. Headline stacks, timelines, comparison charts, data visualizations, ecosystem maps. You build these from detailed written directives. Maximum 8 per video.



B.R4, Stock Footage: Atmospheric footage from Envato Elements. Used for mood and energy, not proof. Short clips only, 3 to 5 seconds maximum.



B.R5, Kinetic Text: Full-screen animated text 
nts for key phrases and thesis statements, or lower third name/title/stat bars. Maximum 12 per video.



B.R6a, Source Video: Real YouTube footage sourced via WayinVideo. The Editor's Table provides search terms. You search YouTube for the title, paste the URL into WayinVideo, use "Find 
nts" with the provided keywords, select the best clip, and trim. Visual only, always mute source audio. Minimum 8 per video. A visible channel credit 
 must appear on screen for every source video clip.





BRANDED GLITCH (SOUND IDENTITY)



Every video features 4 branded glitches, a signature chromatic RGB split with a digital glitch sound effect, lasting 0.3 seconds. These are the ONLY sound effects in the entire video. No additional SFX on stat reveals, transitions, scene changes, or anywhere else. The branded glitch is the sound identity of the channel. Placement is specified in the Editor's Table.





LIVE-ACTION VIDEOS (OCCASIONAL)



The majority of your work will be AI avatar videos. However, there will be occasions where you'll edit videos featuring the real Francis on camera. For example, hands-on product reviews, studio walkthroughs, or special topic deep dives. These videos still follow the same B-roll editing standards (documentation screenshots, source footage, AE compositions, kinetic text) but with real human footage as the A-roll instead of the avatar. The AI cleanup pipeline does not apply to these videos. Frequency will vary, but expect this as part of the role.





AI AVATAR CLEANUP (CRITICAL)



The AI avatar footage contains synthesis artifacts (temporal flickering, face-body boundary distortion, micro-jitter, and compression ghosting) that are visible on large screens and monitors. Before any editing begins, all avatar A-roll must go through this cleanup pipeline:



1. After Effects, Neat Video: Apply to all avatar A-roll. Reduces temporal flickering and compression artifacts. This is the primary tool for cleaning AI avatar footage.



2. After Effects, RSMB (ReelSmart Motion Blur): Add motion blur between frames. Smooths the micro-jitter that causes the "dizzy" feeling on AI faces.



3. After Effects, Mocha Face Tracking: Track the face region, apply subtle skin noise reduction to face only. Do not over-smooth. Keep it natural.



4. After Effects, Face-Body Seam Cleanup: Gaussian blur 0.5 to 1px on the boundary where AI face meets body/neck. Hides the synthesis seam.



5. Premiere Pro, Color Grade: Consistent Lumetri color grade across all avatar shots. Match color temperature with B-roll.



6. Premiere Pro, Film Grain Overlay: Organic film grain at 5 to 10% opacity over entire video. Grain masks digital artifacts and makes footage feel natural.



You must also be able to identify and mask unnatural AI movements, such as awkward hand gestures or slow, robotic eye blinks, through strategic cuts, zooms, B-roll placement, and motion graphics. The goal is to never let the viewer notice something is off.



If you've worked with AI-generated footage before (HeyGen, Synthesia, or similar), that's a big plus. If not, you must be willing to learn these techniques quickly.





REQUIRED SKILLS



These are non-negotiable. If you can't demonstrate these in your portfolio or test project, this role isn't the right fit.



Adobe Premiere Pro. Confident, daily-driver level.



Adobe After Effects. Must be comfortable building custom compositions from written directives (animated diagrams, comparison layouts, data visualizations, framework graphics, headline stacks, timelines).



Split-screen composition. Building and managing dynamic split-panel layouts where content changes every 5 seconds.



Motion graphics and kinetic text. Bold full-screen typography, animated stat callouts, lower thirds, text reveals.



Color grading. Lumetri color correction, skin tone matching, consistent grade across mixed footage sources.



Noise reduction and artifact cleanup. Neat Video or equivalent temporal noise reduction experience.



Face tracking. Mocha or similar tool for selective face region processing.



AI footage awareness. Ability to spot and fix synthesis artifacts (ghosting, jitter, face-body seam, unnatural movement) through cleanup tools and strategic editing choices.





OTHER REQUIREMENTS



A computer capable of handling 4K video editing.

Reliable internet and consistent availability.

Strong attention to detail.

Ability to meet weekly deadlines (3 long-form videos + 1 short per week).

Comfortable using Asana for task management and team communication. All assignments, feedback, and deadlines are managed through Asana.





COMPENSATION AND GROWTH



$1,000 USD per month paid bi-weekly ($500 every two weeks). This is probationary pay for the first 90 days.



The $1,000 monthly rate is based on delivering all 16 videos per month (12 long-form + 4 shorts). Pay is tied to output. If deliverables are consistently missed or incomplete, compensation will be adjusted accordingly.



We cover the Upwork service fee. You receive the full $1,000.



Guaranteed pay increase after 90 days as long as quality remains high and you pass probation.



Full-time, long-term position with room to grow.



Envato Elements access provided for stock footage and assets.



Entry-level candidates and recent graduates welcome. We value reliability and hunger over years of experience.





POST-PROBATION GROWTH (AFTER 90 DAYS)



This is where things get exciting. After probation, top performers take on expanded responsibilities and higher pay. This includes:



YouTube thumbnail creation (templates and direction provided).

Full YouTube publishing: uploading, metadata, thumbnails, scheduling.

Script development and content creation support.

End-to-end video production ownership.

1 short per video (3 vertical shorts per week, up from 1).



Expanded responsibilities come with increased pay. The more you grow, the more you earn. We want editors who see this as a career path, not just a paycheck.





WORKING WITH US. WHAT TO EXPECT



This is a professional working relationship and we want to be upfront about how things work so there are no surprises.



Revisions and Quality Control:

Every video goes through a review process before publishing. You should expect feedback and revision requests on most edits, especially in the first few months as we align on style and standards. Revisions are a normal part of the workflow, not a sign that something went wrong. If something doesn't meet our quality standards, you'll be asked to fix it before it goes live. The goal is to get better together over time.



Confidentiality:

All scripts, workflows, production systems, visual templates, and content strategies you're exposed to through this role are confidential. You may not share, reproduce, or discuss any internal materials, processes, or unreleased content outside of this working relationship. This applies during and after your time with us.



Work Ownership:

All content you create in this role (edits, compositions, motion graphics, templates, shorts, thumbnails) belongs to the channel. You may not reuse, repurpose, or include any work created for us in your personal portfolio or for other clients without written permission.



Availability and Communication:

You're expected to be reachable during agreed working hours via Asana. All assignments, deadlines, feedback, and revisions are managed through Asana, not
, not DMs. When breaking news hits, same-day communication and turnaround may be required. If you're unavailable for an extended period, advance notice is expected.



Publishing Authorization (Post-Probation):

Once you're granted access to the YouTube channel for publishing, you may only upload, schedule, or modify content that has been explicitly approved. No unauthorized uploads, title changes, description edits, or scheduling adjustments without sign-off.





PERFORMANCE STANDARDS AND CONTRACTOR TERMS



This is an independent contractor arrangement through Upwork. This is not an employment relationship and does not include benefits, severance, or employment protections.



During the 90-day probation period, either party may end the arrangement at any time, for any reason, with no notice required.



After probation, we follow a structured feedback process. If quality standards are not being met, deadlines are consistently missed, or communication breaks down, the process is:



1. Verbal feedback identifying the specific issue and what needs to change.

2. Written notice via Asana with a clear improvement timeline.

3. If the issue persists after written notice, the arrangement will be ended.



We are direct about expectations and fair about giving you the chance to improve. That said, certain actions may result in immediate termination without the above process, including but not limited to: breach of confidentiality, unauthorized publishing or modification of channel content, extended unexcused absence without notice, or any conduct that puts the channel's reputation or operations at risk.



We reserve the right to end the arrangement at our discretion. Reasonable notice will be provided whenever possible.



This is designed to be a long-term home. We're not looking to cycle through editors. We want people who grow with us, take ownership, and build something they're proud of. If you bring the work ethic and talent, we'll bring the opportunity, structure, and pay increases to match.





TO APPLY



Link to your portfolio or 2 to 3 sample edits.

Brief description of your editing setup (computer specs, software).

Your availability and timezone.

Short note on why you'd be a good fit.



We're looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and excited to grow with a channel focused on cutting-edge AI content. This is a full-time commitment, ideal for someone early in their career who wants consistent work, a growing portfolio, and a long-term home.

title: Accounting Specialist (Contractor)
description:
Location: Remote (U.S.-Based Company)

Engagement Type: Independent Contractor



Position Overview

We are a U.S.-based media company seeking an experienced and highly organized Accounting

Specialist to support our finance operations. This contractor role is responsible for managing

accounts payable and receivable, maintaining accurate vendor and client records, and ensuring

sound accounting practices.

in QuickBooks Online and Excel/Google Sheets. This role plays a critical part in maintaining

accurate financial records, reconciling accounts, and supporting financial reporting processes.

Availability to align with US Mountain Standard Time

title: Technical & On-Page SEO Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a highly analytical and client-facing Technical SEO Specialist with a minimum of 4 years of experience. You will be the technical backbone of our SEO strategy, responsible for diagnosing complex crawl issues, leading high-stakes domain migrations, and masterminding on-page optimization strategies. This role requires a unique blend of "under-the-hood" technical prowess and an editorial eye for content performance.



This is not a "back-office" role. You will be expected to lead client meetings, explain complex crawl data in plain English, and act as a consultant to international stakeholders. The ideal candidate has a "detective" mindset for technical issues and a "teacher" mindset when presenting to clients.



Key Responsibilities

_Deep Crawl & Infrastructure Analysis: Perform exhaustive audits to identify patterns in crawl budget waste, rendering bottlenecks, and IA flaws.

_Strategic On-Page Optimization: Beyond basic meta tags, you will develop sophisticated on-page strategies including semantic keyword clustering, internal linking architecture, and content gap analysis to improve topical authority.

_Domain & Site Migrations: Lead the full lifecycle of complex migrations. You’ll ensure that not only do the URLs redirect correctly, but that the on-page content and metadata are preserved or improved during the transition.

_Performance Storytelling: Present findings directly to clients. You must be able to explain how a technical fix (like Core Web Vitals) combined with an on-page fix (like NLP-driven content updates) creates a winning ROI.

_Content-Technical Liaison: Work with content teams to ensure new assets are optimized for both users and search engines from day one (
 markup, header hierarchy, and image optimization).



Required Experience & Skills

_4+ Years Experience: Proven track record in a technical/on-page SEO role, ideally in an agency or enterprise environment.

_Migration Veteran: Experience managing large-scale domain migrations with zero loss in organic equity.

_Search Intent Mastery: A deep understanding of how to map keywords to the buyer’s journey and optimize content for Featured Snippets and "People Also Ask" boxes.

_The "Dev" Language: Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and how they interact with on-page elements.

_Data Manipulator: Expert-level ability to use Excel/Google Sheets to merge crawl data with keyword performance data.

_Enterprise / Commercial Websites: Deep understanding of large scale websites and impact of SEO to e-commerce.

_Exceptional English Communication: You must possess advanced verbal and written English skills. You are comfortable leading live presentations and handling "on-the-spot" technical questions from clients with confidence.

_Proven Client-Facing Background: Experience managing client expectations, defending strategies, and reporting on KPIs directly to business owners or CMOs.



Technical Stack

_The ideal candidate must be a power user of:

_Project Management: Jira, Asana, Monday, Plaky or any other similar tools.

_Crawlers: Screaming Frog (Expert), or Lumar.

_Analytics & Performance: Google Search Console, GA4, and Lighthouse and pagespeed insights.

_SEO Platforms: Semrush or related / similar platforms

_Diagnostic Tools: Screaming Frog Log File Analyser, Chrome DevTools.

title: Expert Graphic Designer (Screen Printing Color Separations & Mockups)
description:
We are looking for a highly technical and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. This is not a "creative concept" role—this is a production-heavy role that requires a deep understanding of the screen printing industry.



The ideal candidate must be a master of color separations for automatic presses and be able to visualize how a logo will actually look and fit on various promotional products based on technical specifications.



Key Responsibilities

- Expert Color Separations: Prepare high-quality separations for automatic screen printing (Spot color, Simulated Process, and CMYK).



- Press-Ready Files: Ensure all files are set up with proper registration marks, trapping, and underbases. We use a registration template for all our files so the seps can be easily uploaded to our CTS.



- Fast & Accurate Mockups: Create realistic digital mockups of logos on garments and promotional goods (pens, bags, mugs, etc.).



- Technical Compliance: Read and interpret product descriptions to identify "Imprint Area" limitations. You must ensure logos are scaled correctly and placed within the allowable printing zones for each specific item.



Technical Requirements:

- Software Mastery: Expert level in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop.



- Screen Printing Knowledge: You must understand mesh counts, squeegee pressure, and how ink interacts with different fabric blends.



- Attention to Detail: Ability to spot potential printing issues (e.g., lines that are too thin to hold detail or fonts that will fill in) before the job hits the press.



- Speed: Ability to turn around high-volume mockup requests quickly without sacrificing accuracy.



Work Schedule & Requirements

- US Business Hours: This is a full-time position requiring you to work during our standard business hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM MST). This is the night shift in the Philippines. You must be comfortable and available for real-time communication during these hours.



- nTime Tracking: We use Monitask for time tracking and proof of work. You must be willing to use this software during all working hours. Zero-tolerance for use of mouse clicker apps.



- Reliable Infrastructure: Since you will be working our daytime hours, you must have a reliable high-speed internet connection and a backup power source (UPS/Power station) to ensure no downtime during the shift.





Please send your portfolio, but specifically highlight:



- Examples of your color separation work (show the original art vs. the separated channels).



- Examples of product mockups you have created.



***Please put the word "AUTOMATIC" in your subject line so I know you read the full description.

This role is ideal for someone who communicates clearly via
, phone and text, responds quickly, and thrives in a fast-paced, changing,  time-sensitive environment.

The ideal candidate will need to be down to earth but customer-service focused and ready to tackle multitasking early in the morning!



Schedule: Split shift required, between the hours of 6AM-6PM EST. All Times listed are in EST, as we operate fully on Eastern Standard Time. 

Monday - Thursday: 6:00 AM – 10:00 AM &  2:00 PM – 6:00 PM

Fridays: 6:00 AM – 9:00 AM & 2:00 PM – 7:00 PM





Responsibilities

• Monitor and respond to incoming staffing requests in real time

• Manage same-day call-offs and urgent coverage needs

• Communicate promptly with childcare centers to confirm requests are being worked on

• Schedule childcare substitutes quickly and efficiently



Provide excellent customer service

description:

Remote - Reports to Founder and Co Founder



About Us:

We are a startup building digital products focused on emotional support, personal development, and mental well being. Our products include ebooks, workbooks, guided posters and coloring books and app based tools designed to help people improve emotional awareness and personal growth.



The Role:

We are looking for a Social Media and Digital Product Growth Manager who can help promote and grow our digital products across social media platforms. This role is responsible for growing our audience, creating content, managing influencers, and driving traffic that leads to product sales. This is not a basic posting role. We are looking for someone who understands how to promote digital products and turn attention into customers.



Responsibilities:

- Digital Product Promotion: Promote our digital products across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and other relevant platforms.

- Content Creation: Create short form videos, graphics, and written posts that highlight our products and educate our audience.

- Social Media Management: Manage daily posting across social media platforms and maintain a consistent content calendar.

- Influencer Outreach and Management: Identify influencers who align with our audience, manage outreach, coordinate collaborations, and handle payment communication.

- Product Launch Campaigns: Plan and execute promotional campaigns for new digital product launches.

- Affiliate and Creator Partnerships

- Identify creators and affiliates who can promote our products and expand our reach.

- Audience Engagement: Respond to comments and messages and actively engage with the community.

- Analytics and Performance Tracking: Track engagement, traffic, and product conversions from social media campaigns

- Trend Monitoring: Stay updated on platform trends and adapt them to support product promotion.



Requirements:

- 1 to 3 years experience promoting digital products, online programs, or ecommerce brands

- Strong understanding of TikTok, Instagram, and short form video platforms

- Experience working with influencers or creator partnerships

- Ability to create engaging social media content including short videos

- Strong organization and communication skills

- Comfortable working in a fast moving startup environment



What Success Looks Like:

1. Grow the social media audience across platforms

2. Increase visibility of our digital product

3. Drive consistent traffic to product pages

4. Convert attention into real product sales



Compensation:

Competitive and based on experience. Details will be discussed during the interview process.



How to Apply:

Please send the following to 
 :

1. Your Resume

2. Links to social media accounts you have managed

3. Examples of digital products you have helped promote

4. A short note explaining how you would promote a digital product using social media

We are looking for someone proactive, creative, and excited about helping a startup grow from the ground up.

Employee Relations & Communication

Qualifications

Skills: Excellent organizational and time-management skills with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage both scheduling and recruitment workflows efficiently.

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Cold Calling/Appointment Setting/Lead Qualification)
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Lead Manager

Lead Qualification: Assess and qualify potential leads to identify their motivation, timeline, and lead type.

, along with a short recording introducing yourself and sharing why you’d be a perfect fit for this role. As an applicant you must also have a PayPal account, and list prior real estate experience.





We welcome you to join us and be a part of something extraordinary!

title: Sales Operations Project Manager
description:
Base: 80,000 PHP/month + Performance Bonus

Wellness Day Off after probation



We’re looking for a strong, proactive Sales Operations Project Manager who can lead a sales pod, drive accountability across closers and setters, and maintain seamless communication between Sales, Growth Ops, and Tech Ops.



This is a leadership and coordination role — you are the operational backbone that ensures the pod performs at a high level, SOPs are followed, data is accurate, and every tea
mber stays aligned and supported. If you’re the kind of person who naturally takes ownership, thrives in fast-paced environments, and knows how to communicate with clarity and authority, you’ll excel here.



This is a full-time position, requiring consistent availability from 8am to 4pm Eastern Time, with solid internet, power, and backup.



All applicants must complete DISC and IQ assessments before applying.



?



Detailed Job Description Breakdown



Pod Leadership & Daily Operations

• Lead and manage the daily workflow of closers and setters to ensure the sales pod operates smoothly.

• Run daily huddles, weekly check-ins, and pipeline reviews with clear agendas and follow-through.

• Manage pod-level projects (e.g., SOP rollouts, funnel changes, tracking fixes) end-to-end, ensuring on-time execution.

• Monitor pod performance, identify bottlenecks early, and escalate issues with solutions—not problems.

• Own the onboarding and offboarding process for new sales staff, including systems access, SOP orientation, and performance expectations.

• Ensure all pod members maintain clean calendars, proper availability, and updated CRM/task workflows.



Quality Assurance, Accountability & Compliance

• Hold closers and setters accountable for submitting accurate EODs, updating dispositions, and following SOPs consistently.

• Conduct quality checks on sales calls, calendar availability, CRM hygiene, and follow-up sequences.

• Audit all sales data regularly (bookings, show rates, sales, payments, renewals) to ensure accuracy before reporting.

• Flag performance gaps early and coach tea
mbers with clarity, empathy, and firmness.

• Ensure all pod documentation, scorecards, and checklists are consistently maintained and up to date.



Cross-Department Coordination

• Work directly with Front-End Tech Ops, Back-End Automation Specialists, and Growth Ops to resolve tech issues, data discrepancies, or workflow breakdowns.

• Communicate updates clearly and quickly across all stakeholders — closers, setters, Growth Ops, SOMs, Tech Ops, and leadership.

• Serve as the bridge for multi-team projects (automation fixes, tracking repairs, new funnels, offer migrations).

• Maintain a strong working relationship with salespeople (who may be impatient or stressed under pressure) while keeping communication tight, professional, and steady.



Reporting & Performance Management

• Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports for leadership, ensuring all numbers are accurate and validated.

• Track KPIs across the full funnel: leads ? setters ? calls ? sales ? renewals.

• Support leadership in evaluating pod performance, identifying improvement plans, and implementing corrective action.

• Ensure the sales pod meets revenue, activity, and quality targets consistently.



?



Skills & Qualifications

• Project Management experience is mandatory.

(Comfortable managing timelines, action items, dependencies, and follow-through across multiple teams.)

• At least 1–2 years experience in sales operations, sales admin, sales coordination, or a similar leadership/ops role.

• Strong leadership and interpersonal skills — able to hold people accountable with firmness and empathy.

• Excellent verbal and written communication; comfortable leading huddles, giving feedback, and jumping on calls.

• Highly organized, detail-driven, and able to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced environment.

• Tech-savvy and comfortable navigating CRM, calendar tools, funnels, spreadsheets, and SOPs.

• Experience working with sales teams (closers/setters) is strongly preferred.

• Solution-oriented, proactive, and able to anticipate problems before they happen.

• Thrives in an environment where communication, speed, and ownership are non-negotiable.



?



If this sounds like you…



If you love driving clarity, supporting high-performance teams, and being the operational heartbeat of a fast-moving sales pod, we’d love to meet you. This role is perfect for someone who wants to grow into higher-level ops leadership while playing a mission-critical role in our sales organization.



?



About Sales Possible



At Sales Possible, we partner with mission-driven online coaching companies to build world-class marketing and sales ecosystems. We’re not just a sales team provider — we architect full-funnel systems, optimize performance, and support our clients with cutting-edge automation, AI, and operations infrastructure.



We work with high-growth education brands and expert coaches, helping them scale sustainably while delivering exceptional customer experiences.



We’re a fast-moving, tight-knit team that values ownership, proactive communication, and continuous improvement. If you want to work in an environment obsessed with growth, clarity, and performance — you’ll feel right at home here.

title: Automation Engineer (Pipedream + Supabase + OpenAI Responses API + GoHighLevel)
description:
The architecture is defined. Your job is to implement the system end to end, wire all integrations, test, deploy, and stabilize it in production. This must be built directly by you and not delegated to AI agent builder tools.



Tech stack

Supabase Postgres as source of truth

Pipedream as orchestrator

OpenAI Responses API for structured JSON outputs

GoHighLevel for CRM contacts tasks booking notes and calendar workflows

ScrapingBee or similar proxy for public page fetch when needed



Scope to build

1 Supabase data foundation

Create and document Supabase tables for signals intake scoring response options lead promotion quote and pre call outputs outcomes prompts versioning fulfillment routing commission tracking and system logs. Implement prompt versioning in Supabase so prompts can be updated without editing Pipedream code.



2 Venice Intelligence Hub signal pipeline

Build a signal discovery pipeline that collects public demand signals from
 and 
 using search based discovery and public page fetch. Store all signals in Supabase, deduplicate them, score them using OpenAI Responses API structured output, generate response options, and surface them in a simple operator view. The system must support View Source Copy Reply and Promote to GHL after a human decision.



3 Unified Quote plus Pre Call Engine

On a GoHighLevel trigger tag pipeline stage or manual action, Pipedream pulls lead data from GHL and plan reference data from Supabase then calls OpenAI Responses API one time to generate a structured quote prep plus pre call brief. Write outputs back to Supabase and to GHL custom fields and notes.



4 Fulfillment launcher and outcome logging

Build a routing map in Supabase that tells Jill which enrollment tool to use for submission such as Sunfire Connecture HealthSherpa Integrity Connect or carrier portals. Create a simple outcome logging flow that records carrier plan effective date confirmation ID and writes results to Supabase and updates GHL.



5 Commission and channel aware layer

Implement Tidewater first routing and Pinnacle fallback logic. Create expected vs paid commission tables and reconciliation reporting. Implement a single intake pipeline for commission statements and store transactions in Supabase with reconciliation flags.



Rules and constraints

No autonomous posting or messaging on social media. No login automation into personal
 or 
 accounts. The system should support discovery and operator assisted engagement only. No autonomous browser agents as runtime. No reliance on Manus or similar AI agent builder products. Do not use Manus to build or run any part of this system. All work must be implemented directly by the developer using the stated stack.



Requirements

Strong API and webhook experience

Pipedream experience preferred or equivalent automation platform experience

Supabase or Postgres experience

OpenAI API integration experience especially structured outputs

GoHighLevel experience is a plus

Node.js and JSON handling required

Ability to implement retries logging and error alerts



Deliverables

Supabase schema created and documented

Pipedream workflows created and documented

GHL triggers and custom fields mapping documented

End to end test showing a signal can be collected scored and displayed and a lead can be promoted to GHL

End to end test showing unified quote plus pre call engine writes back to GHL

Fulfillment routing and outcome logging working

Commission routing and reconciliation tables working

Short Loom videos for each major component plus a final walkthrough



Stabilization commitment required

After deployment you must remain available for 1 to 2 weeks to monitor and fix issues. This includes quick response to bugs minor adjustments and ensuring the system runs reliably in production.



Time and engagement

Project based or hourly. Expected 60 to 120 hours for initial build depending on experience plus the 1 to 2 week stabilization period. Provide daily progress updates.



To apply

Send examples of webhook automations you built, your experience with Supabase OpenAI and GoHighLevel, and confirm you can overlap US Eastern time for 1 to 2 hours daily for coordination.  MUST SIGN NDA & Survival Clause

You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.

mbers/leaders

title: Full-Time Influencer Outreach & Management VA
description:
Join a fast-growing global jewelry e-commerce brand where your work directly drives results. At ARDANT, we create sleek, poke-free hoops designed for all-day comfort and style—and we’re scaling fast. We’re looking for a full-time Influencer Outreach & Management VA to own our influencer partnerships and help us grow to the next level. This is a high-impact role where the creators you secure will shape our brand’s presence on TikTok, Instagram, and beyond.



Influencer Sourcing

• Research and identify high-quality influencers (micro & mid-tier) in fashion, beauty, and jewelry on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

• Find influencers aligned with ARDANT’s aesthetic 

• Compile influencer details in a Google Sheets tracker (name, handle,
, engagement rates, past brand work)



Influencer Outreach

• Craft personalized outreach messages and send DMs &
s

• Handle gifting negotiations and occasional paid partnership discussions

• Ensure all agreements, gifting, and deliverables are properly tracked



Follow-Ups & Relationship Management

• Track influencer responses and product shipments

• Follow up consistently and professionally to maximize posting rates

• Collect and organize content submissions, including raw footage for repurposing

• Flag potential long-term partners for future campaigns



Campaign Tracking & Reporting

• Maintain dashboards for outreach, responses, and posting rates

• Identify top-performing influencers for future partnerships

• Provide weekly reports on campaign results



Who We’re Looking For

Must-Have Experience:

• 2+ years in influencer marketing, outreach, or VA work for a fashion, beauty, or lifestyle brand

• Understanding of influencer trends, engagement quality, and brand fit

• Strong experience managing influencer trackers in Google Sheets

• Familiarity with tools like Upfluence, Modash, or SARAL is a plus

Skills & Attributes:

• Excellent written English for engaging outreach messages

• Highly organized and detail-oriented—no follow-ups missed

• Fast executor who takes initiative without waiting for instructions

• Persistent yet professional in communication

• Data-driven with the ability to analyze influencer performance

• Strong eye for TikTok trends and Instagram aesthetics



Why Join Us

• Full-time salary (40 hours/week)

• Opportunity to move into senior influencer marketing positions

• Your work will directly fuel ARDANT’s growth and visibility

• Learn and grow with access to influencer marketing tools and training

• Be part of a supportive, ambitious, and fast-growing team



How to Apply

Please share your CV (in a Google Drive link) to be considered.

title: Rockstar Cold Caller (Lead Gen & Outreach)
description:
I am looking to hire 2–3 high-performing Cold Callers to join our team for lead generation and outbound outreach.



This is not a beginner role. We need professionals who are comfortable navigating gatekeepers, handling objections, and closing for the appointment. If you are confident on the phone and know how to turn a "maybe" into a booked opportunity, we want to talk to you.



Position Details

Compensation: Competitive Hourly Rate

Growth: Rate increases based on performance, consistency, and KPIs

Environment: 100% Flexible Remote Work

Schedule: Must be available to work during US Business Hours (EST/PST)



What You’ll Do

Outbound Prospecting: Make high-volume cold calls to potential leads.

Engagement: Build immediate rapport and clearly articulate our value proposition.

Lead Qualification: Filter prospects and set qualified appointments.

Administrative Tracking: Keep activity logs updated in Google Sheets or our CRM.

Nurturing: Send professional follow-up
s to prospects after calls.

Reporting: Provide brief daily updates on call volume and outcomes.

Scripts and training materials are provided, but you must be able to think on your feet during live conversations.



What I’m Looking For

Proven Track Record: Solid experience in cold calling (Real Estate, SaaS, or Insurance experience is a plus).

Flawless Communication: Strong English verbal and written skills.

Resilience: A "thick skin" and a positive attitude toward handling rejection.

Reliability: High-speed internet, a quiet workspace, and a proven history of punctuality.

Data-Driven: Ability to meet daily/weekly KPIs and report data accurately.

Coachability: Open to feedback and willing to refine your pitch based on results.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To ensure you have great attention to detail (a must for this job), please follow these steps exactly:

Subject Line: Use the word “PINK” in your application title.

Voice Recording: Attach or link a 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself and highlighting your cold calling wins.

The "Why": Briefly explain what makes you more effective on the phone than other callers.



Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions or are missing a voice sample will be automatically disqualified.

title: Blog Manager
description:
Part-Time Blog & Content Manager



Walker Wellness & Aesthetics Clinic | The Scalp Boss



Position Overview



Walker Wellness & Aesthetics Clinic and The Scalp Boss are seeking a detail-oriented and creative Part-Time Blog & Content Manager to oversee the development, optimization, and publishing of blog content across our websites.



This role is responsible for managing SEO-optimized blog content that drives website traffic, improves search engine rankings, and converts readers into clients and customers.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, understands SEO-driven content strategy, and has experience working with WordPress blogs, digital marketing, and content management.



This is a remote, part-time position with flexible hours.



About Our Brands

Walker Wellness & Aesthetics Clinic



Walker Wellness & Aesthetics Clinic is a veteran-owned medical wellness clinic located in Houston, Texas offering services including:



• Hair Restoration

• Medical Weight Loss

• Aesthetic Treatments

• Veteran Nexus Letters & DBQ Exams

• Wellness Therapies



Website:

The Scalp Boss is a hair restoration and scalp health brand focused on helping individuals experiencing hair thinning and hair loss through education, treatments, and natural hair care products.



Website:

• Track blog performance using Google Analytics and SEO tools

• Identify opportunities to improve rankings and website traffic

• Provide periodic content performance updates

• Assist with Pinterest blog distribution

• Collaborate with marketing initiatives and product promotions

• Maintain organization of blog content calendar

• Experience managing blogs or content marketing

• Experience using WordPress or similar CMS platforms

• Familiarity with SEO tools such as RankMath, Ahrefs, or SEMrush

• Strong writing and editing skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects

• Experience in health, wellness, beauty, or medical content preferred

title: AI Product Video Creator
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled AI Video Creator to produce realistic product marketing videos using AI tools.



This role focuses on generating product usage videos, detailed product shots, and cinematic visuals for marketing campaigns.



Our products are primarily in the beauty and wellness space.



We are NOT looking for a basic video editor. We need someone who can create original AI-generated visuals of products being used and presented in engaging ways.



Responsibilities



• Create AI-generated videos of products being used or applied

• Generate detailed product shots (close-ups, macro, texture shots, etc.)

• Produce dramatic or exaggerated visual clips for advertising

• Create short-form ad content for platforms like Meta and TikTok

• Follow creative briefs and deliver multiple variations for testing

• Refine and polish AI outputs into clean marketing-ready videos



Requirements



• Experience using AI video generation tools (Runway, Pika, Kaiber, Stable Video, etc.)

• Ability to generate realistic scenes of products and human interaction

• Strong visual sense for lighting, composition, and product aesthetics

• Understanding of marketing visuals that capture attention quickly

• Ability to work quickly and iterate based on feedback



Bonus Skills



• Experience working with beauty or skincare products

• Knowledge of short-form ad creative strategies

• Motion graphics or advanced editing experience

• Experience creating content for Amazon listings or paid ads



To confirm you read the full job description, please start your application by answering this question:

What AI tools do you currently use to generate videos or images?



Applications without portfolio samples of AI-generated work will not be reviewed.

title: WordPress Web Designer (Elementor) — Local SEO + Lead-Gen Sites (Home Services)
description:
About Us

Foundational Marketing Hub builds high-converting local SEO websites for home service contractors:

Foundation Repair

Basement Waterproofing

Roofing / Restoration

Pool Builders

We do not build “pretty brochure websites.”

We build fast-loading, mobile-first lead-gen sites using templates, SOPs, and checklists.



What You’ll Do

You will build WordPress pages using Elementor based on our proven structure.



? You are responsible for:

Building service pages + city pages using Elementor

Following our conversion layout (CTA above the fold, proof near CTA, scannable sections, FAQs)

Proper heading hierarchy (H1 = Service + City; clean H2 structure)

Internal linking implementation

Mobile-first responsiveness + clean spacing

Image compression + performance discipline

Embedding forms/calendars/chat widgets/tracking scripts

QA: mobile check, form test, link test

Short Loom walkthroughs explaining what you built



? You are not responsible for:

Copywriting

Client management

Strategy

Standards (Non-Negotiable)

Clean mobile-first layout

No unnecessary animations/sliders

Consistent template structure + section hierarchy

Internal links added correctly

Forms tested + working

Pages load fast (performance > flashy design)



Requirements

2+ years WordPress experience

Strong Elementor experience (must provide live examples)

Comfortable with Hello theme or lightweight theme setups

Basic HTML/CSS for minor adjustments

Understands local SEO page structure (service + city pages, internal links, FAQs)

Comfortable in ClickUp

Clear written English + reliable with deadlines



Nice to Have (Bonus)

Core Web Vitals / performance improvement experience

Experience embedding GoHighLevel forms/calendars

Avada familiarity (legacy projects)



AI Workflow (High Priority)

We actively use AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude, etc.) to speed up troubleshooting, writing small CSS snippets, performance fixes, and schema validation. You don’t need to be a custom developer, but you must be comfortable using AI and validating outputs before publishing.



Answer these AI questions:

Give one example of an Elementor/WordPress problem you solved faster using AI. What did you prompt and what changed?

When AI gives you code, how do you validate it before going live?



Paid Test (Required)

Final candidates will complete a paid test:

Build 1 service page + 1 city page using our template

Apply mobile + speed best practices

Record a 2–3 minute Loom explaining your build + QA process



Compensation / How to Apply

Monthly pay range: $900–$1,150 USD (depending on experience + speed)

Start your message with: ELEMENTOR



Send:

2–3 live Elementor sites you built

Your monthly rate expectation (within the range above)

Your weekly availability + timezone



Answer:

Top 5 things you do to keep Elementor sites fast

Have you built service + city page structures for local SEO before?

Are you comfortable embedding forms and testing tracking?



Applications without live Elementor examples will not be reviewed.

We are looking for a professional who understands editorial standards and can consistently deliver fast, compelling, and quotable pitches in response to media queries (HARO, Featured, etc.) while cultivating positive journalist relationships.

A writing background and portfolio/sample submissions are required.



What You’ll Receive

* Starting Pay: $450 per month

* Performance Bonuses: Top-performing specialists can advance from $450 to up to $1,000 per month in under six months by meeting our quality and speed KPIs (details provided upon hire).

* Paid Holidays (Philippine Official Holidays) & Paid Time Off: Available after regularization based on consistent, excellent performance.

* Targeted Training Provided: We will train you in our outreach tools and strategies; you must bring the foundational writing ability.

* Annual Bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.



Who We’re Looking For

* Non-Negotiable: Proven writing experience (1+ years preferred) with the ability to submit a portfolio or relevant writing samples (e.g., media pitches, articles, marketing copy).

* Exceptional Writing Ability: Superb command of written English, strong grammar, and excellent editorial judgment. All outputs must be publication-ready.

* Relationship-Oriented Professional: Experience communicating politely and professionally, with the ability to build long-term rapport with journalists.

* Strategic Thinker: Understanding of media relations, PR strategy, or SEO link building is a significant advantage. You should know how to pitch a compelling angle—not just promote a company.

* Fast, Focused, and Reliable: Ability to respond quickly and deliver high-quality content under tight deadlines (e.g., targeting submission within the first 50 responses).



Key Responsibilities

As a Remote Editorial Outreach Specialist, your primary focus will be generating media coverage through expert communication and strong relationship management:

* Craft Quotable Pitches: Write clear, concise, expert-level responses with strong soundbites and quotable insights reporters can use immediately.

* Strategic Outreach & Follow-Up: Manage query platforms (HARO, Featured, etc.), ensuring fast submissions and timely, professional follow-ups to build journalist relationships.

* Communication Management: Organize, research, and respond to media correspondence with clarity, professionalism, and a focus on maintaining positive rapport.

This is a long-term, fully remote position focused on content quality, measurable media outcomes, and professional relationship building.?Regularization to permanent status is based on consistently excellent performance.

title: Procurement Specialist
description:
Source products and locate key suppliers that can meet the company's purchasing agreement and deliver high quality products according to its specifications.



Job Description:

Deal with end to end supplier sourcing process.

Manage new and existing suppliers’ accounts to ensure smooth operations.

Build and maintain strong, long-lasting relationships with suppliers.

Research products that are viable to sell.

Place reorders for existing product lines based on demand and inventory levels.

Negotiate pricing, order quantities, production timelines, and payment terms.

Monitor ongoing production processes to ensure timely and quality completion.

Experienced in dealing with Chinese suppliers - REQUIREMENT

Speaking mandarin is a HUGE ADVANTAGE



BS Business Administration, Management, Industrial Engineering or any related course

At least 2 years of proven experience as a Procurement Specialist or similar role

Proven research experience, including data analysis and report preparation.

Good English communication skills - someone who can express himself/herself very well

Someone who can adapt in a fast-paced environment and someone who learns fast

Works well under pressure

Must be comfortable in receiving feedback / constructive criticism

Someone who has a can-do attitude and focuses more on providing solutions.

This position is primarily a work-from-home arrangement; however, we need a team player who is enthusiastic about collaborating with our team onsite when required. While there’s no fixed schedule for these onsite engagements, they will be planned well in advance to ensure flexibility and alignment with your schedule.
